title: Staff Accountant (US Healthcare)
description:
I am looking for an experienced, analytical, and detail-oriented Staff Accountant for my US healthcare company.



Responsibilities:

• Conduct general bookkeeping tasks and maintain accurate and organized records.

• Perform bank, credit card, and other account reconciliations.

• Research and resolve accounting discrepancies as needed.

• Carry out internal audits and reviews to maintain compliance with internal policies.

• Review and categorize expenses, ensuring alignment with budget and financial guidelines.

• Prepare monthly financial reports for management and stakeholders.

• Process payroll chargebacks and other pertinent transactions.

• Post expenses and manage financial entries.

• Support additional accounting functions and ad hoc projects as assigned.



Qualifications:

• Must have 3-5 years of experience in US healthcare accounting

• Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting

• Proficiency in Sage Intacct is preferred

• Excellent analytical skills and attention to detail

• Self-motivated with strong time management abilities

• Must be willing to work full-time during US Pacific business hours



Apply here:

title: Website Designer / WordPress Developer for Construction Company
description:
Job Type:

Project-based (potential for long-term work)



Job Description



We are looking for a reliable web designer / WordPress developer from the Philippines to build a clean, fast 6-page website for our construction company.



The website should look modern, professional, and mobile-friendly, and must be easy to update later with new projects.



This is a small project with a quick deadline (about 1 week).



Website Pages



The website will have 6 main pages:



Home

About Us

Services

Portfolio / Projects

Project Map

Contact

Important Feature – Project Map



The website must include a Google Map showing completed projects.



Each project will have a map pin.



When clicking the pin, it should show:



• Project photo

• Short description

• Link to the project page



Example:



Quartz Kitchen Countertops – Westlake Village



Portfolio / Projects Page



We want a portfolio system where we can easily add new projects.



Each project page should include:



• Project title

• Photos (5–10 images)

• Short description

• Materials used (example: quartz, porcelain slab, tile)

• City/location

• Google Map location



Example page title:



Quartz Kitchen Countertops – Thousand Oaks



SEO Structure



The website should allow us to create SEO-friendly project pages.



Example URL format:



/quartz-countertops-westlake-village

/tile-shower-installation-thousand-oaks



This will help the website rank in Google.



Requirements



You should be able to:



• Build websites using WordPress (preferred) or Webflow

• Use Elementor or similar page builder

• Create a fast and mobile-friendly website

• Integrate Google Maps with project pins

• Build a portfolio system for projects

• Communicate clearly in English



Content



We will provide:



• Company information

• Project photos

• Logo

• Text content



You will organize the content and build the website.



Timeline



Deadline: About 1 week



Budget



Please include your fixed price for this project in your application.



When applying please include

Links to 3 websites you built

Your fixed price for this project

Estimated completion time

Bonus Skills (optional)



• Basic SEO knowledge

• Website speed optimization

• Experience building contractor or construction websites



Important



Please write the word STONE at the beginning of your application so we know you read the full job description.

title: Direct Response Graphic Designer (E-commerce Jewelry)
description:
About Us:

We are a dynamic and rapidly growing 7-figure women's jewelry brand powered by Shopify. We are passionate about great design that speaks for itself, drawing inspiration from everyday fashion and influencers, and genuinely caring about the products we create and the relationships we build. Our marketing is performance-driven, and high-converting creatives is central to our scaling strategy.



We are looking for a Direct Response Graphic Designer who doesn’t just "design" but engineers ads. You understand that a tiny change in a headline, the placement of a "Star Rating," or the contrast on a lifestyle photo can be the difference between a 1.00 and 4.00 ROAS. You thrive on data, love testing new hooks, and know how to make a premium jewelry brand look expensive while still driving purchases.



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Static & Motion Ads: Designing high-converting static images, "Us vs. Them" comparison charts, feature call-out graphics, and "native-style" overlays for Meta (FB/IG) and Pinterest.



- Creative Iteration: Taking our "winning" ad concepts and creating 5-10 variations (testing different hooks, colors, and CTA placements) to combat ad fatigue.



- UGC Polishing: Taking raw content from our creators and turning it into performance ads with high-impact captions, progress bars, and "Shop Now" end-cards.



- Landing Page Assets: Creating visual assets for Shopify landing pages that maintain the "scent" of the ad and push the customer toward checkout.



 - Data-Informed Design: Meeting daily/weekly with our Creative Strategist/Media Buying team to look at the numbers & performance. If an ad bombed, you want to know why so you can fix the design.



What We’re Looking For:



- Direct Response Experience: You have a portfolio that shows ads, not just logos or brand books. You know what a "Hook" is and how to design for a "Problem/Solution" angle.



- Jewelry/Fashion Eye: You understand how to retouch jewelry to make it "pop" (sparkle, clarity, and color) without making it look fake.



- Typography & Hierarchy: You know how to use text-on-image in a way that is readable on a mobile device but still looks sophisticated.



- Tool Proficiency: Expert in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop/Illustrator). Experience with AI tools/software, Figma or Canva for rapid-fire testing is a plus.



- Speed & Systems: You can move fast. We aren’t looking for 2-week turnaround times; we’re looking for someone who can ship creative tests in 24-48 hours.



The Aesthetic: "Premium Performance"



We aren't a "dropshipping" brand. We are a premium brand. Your designs need to bridge the gap between:



    - The Look: Mejuri, Monica Vinader, or Tiffany & Co.



    - The Performance: High-converting DTC brands like Curology, Bloom, or HelloFresh.



Why Join?



    - Creative Freedom: We believe in testing everything. If you have a wild idea for an ad, we will put spend behind it to see if it wins.



    - Growth: You’ll be at the center of a rapidly scaling brand. As we grow, your role and impact grow.



    - Jewelry Perks: Discounted or free pieces.





Compensation:

$1,000 base monthly salary, plus performance-based bonus/incentives tied to creative contribution.





How to Apply:



    1. Your Portfolio: Specifically highlight 3-5 ads you’ve designed that performed well (and tell us why they worked).



    2. A Short Breakdown: Look at our current Instagram feed/ads. Tell us one thing you’d change to make our ads more "scroll-stopping."

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter
description:
Cold Caller / Appointment Setter - US Business Hours (Night Shift PH)

Company: SigBridge (US-based, Connecticut)

Product: SNSYS - AI-powered business operations solution

Schedule: Full-time, Monday-Friday, 9AM-6PM EST (9PM-6AM Manila)

Payment: Weekly via Wise



What We Do

SNSYS gives small businesses AI that sees, hears, and acts. We replace receptionists, marketers, security guards, and manual operations all for one monthly fee. We're growing fast and need dialers to book meetings with business owners.



The Job

This is not a sales job. This is a dialing job.



You will:

Log into our platform

See your call list

Click dial

Read the script on screen

Repeat
times per day



You will not need to:

Improvise

Go off script

Think about strategy

Do lead research

Close deals



We need your voice and your discipline. Our platform does the heavy lifting.



Requirements



Must have:

Clear, confident English (American clients)

title: Technical AI Co-Pilot & Automation Engineer (n8n + Claude Code Expert)
description:
The Mission



I am building a sophisticated AI-driven Operating System for property management. This involves a hybrid architecture: n8n for deterministic infrastructure and Claude (Agentic AI) for reasoning, decision-making, and autonomous problem-solving.



I’m looking for a Technical Co-pilot to take things to the next level.



The Must-Haves (Non-Negotiable)



- n8n Mastery: You understand complex loops, error-handling branches, and how to keep a workflow from "short-circuiting" when API data gets messy.

- Agentic Frameworks: Deep experience with LLM "Tool-Use" (Function Calling). You must understand how to build and deploy Claude Skills and use Claude Code to create autonomous agents.

- AI-Assisted Development (Claude Code): You are comfortable working in a terminal environment and have experience (or immediate readiness) to use Claude Code as a primary development agent.

- MCP (Model Context Protocol): Familiarity with (or a hunger to master) MCP to connect Claude directly to our local and cloud data sources.

- State Management: You understand how to use Supabase or Redis to give agents 'long-ter
mory' so they don't lose context between executions.



What You Will Build



- Autonomous Agents: Designing agents that can automate 90%+ of a list of pre-defined tasks.

- Skill Development: Writing the "Functions" that Claude uses to read/write to our databases and APIs.

- Hybrid Systems: Building workflows where n8n handles the "plumbing" and Claude handles the "ambiguity."

- Architecture Coaching: Building side-by-side with me.



Who You Are



- You have a background in Computer Science or Software Development.

- You are obsessed with the "AI Revolution" and are constantly testing the latest Claude features.

- You speak "API" fluently (REST, Webhooks, JSON, OAuth).





How to Apply: 



Send a Loom video (max 5 mins) walking me through the "guts" of a system you’ve built and your latest CV



If it's n8n: Show me the logic, the expressions, and how you handle data mapping.

If it's Claude Code / Agentic: Show me the terminal, the "Skills" you've written, or the MCP setup.



Crucial: Don't just show me a ChatGPT/Claude chat window. I want to see the infrastructure (the code, the terminal, or the canvas) that makes the AI actually do something in the real world.

title: Senior Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Senior Executive Assistant



Full-Time  |  Remote — Philippines-Based  |  Microsoft Outlook + AI Tools Required





About You ------------------------



You thrive in complexity. You don't just manage calendars — you manage entire worlds. You've supported a senior executive before, and you understand that your job is to make their life run so smoothly that they barely notice the logistics.



You're already a power user of Microsoft Outlook and know how to build a system, not just respond to one. You're genuinely excited about AI — you use LLMs regularly in your own workflow and you see them as a force multiplier, not a novelty.



You think three steps ahead. You read an
 and immediately understand what it means for the week. You see a gap in the calendar and know it needs to be filled. You anticipate, you prepare, and you follow through — without being asked twice.



If you're looking for a high-trust, full-time role where you'll be genuinely indispensable to a dynamic CEO running multiple businesses, a nonprofit, a real estate portfolio, and a rich family life — this is the role.





About Performance Excellence Partners  ------------------------



Performance Excellence Partners (PEP) is a multimillion-dollar, woman-owned government contracting agency with a 26-year track record of executing complex federal contracts. Led by CEO Rachel Ramirez, PEP is built on a culture of uncommon integrity, inspired problem-solving, and lasting impact.



Rachel also leads a growing coaching and leadership development practice (Pinnacle and PEP Coaching), serves on multiple boards, manages a portfolio of real estate properties, and founded RMLA — a nonprofit focused on community leadership. She is, in short, someone who operates at the highest level in every domain of her life — and needs an EA who can match that pace.





About the Role ------------------------



This is a full-time, remote position based in the Philippines. You will work directly with Rachel as her primary EA, serving as the operational backbone of her professional and personal life.



You'll own her Outlook —
, calendar, contacts, and communications. You'll coordinate her boards, her nonprofit, her travel, her family's logistics, and her properties. You'll turn her coaching ideas into polished content. And you'll always be one step ahead of what she needs next.



Morgan, Rachel's current assistant, will train you on all systems and processes. This is a long-term relationship built on trust, and we're looking for someone who intends to grow into it.





What You'll Do ------------------------



Calendar & Communications



Own the CEO’s Outlook — build and maintain folder structure, rules, and filters for all categories

Manage the CEO’s calendars across PEP, coaching, nonprofit, and personal/family — with full supporting context in every meeting notice

Manage the VP’s calendars for PEP and family as secondary responsibility

Draft, send, and manage professional
 correspondence on Rachel's behalf

Confirm attendance, RSVPs, and registrations for boards, events, and community activities



Nonprofit, Board & Project Management



Own nonprofit operations: monthly speaker coordination, agendas, confirmations, happy hours, community projects, website updates, newsletter

Track commitments across all boards

Manage certification processes — applications, renewals, monthly reports, activity logs

Track badge renewals, credentials, and compliance deadlines in a master tracker

Assist with active loan documentation for airport clients



Travel, Logistics & Admin



Research, book, and build complete itineraries for all business and personal travel

Prepare expense reports and organize receipts for bookkeeper review

Review and prepare travel reimbursements and consultant invoices for payment

Cross-check PEO payroll output for accuracy against timesheet records

Order supplies, manage vendor relationships, schedule and coordinate deliveries



Properties & Personal Life



Monitor Buildium for maintenance issues, tenant activity, and lease expirations

Coordinate property maintenance vendors and contractors

Manage international property logistics (Mexico: visa, Airbnb revenue tracking, utilities)

Handle family logistics: appointments, car registrations, children's volunteer hours, college prep 

Support father-in-law care coordination as needed



Content & Social Media



Support CEO’s LinkedIn presence: share content, respond to comments, connect with key contacts

Manage PEP MailChimp and send e-blasts on schedule

Turn CEO's ideas, notes, and church reflections into formatted PowerPoint slides and coaching content

Assist with light website updates for RMLA and PEP



A Day in the Life



You start your morning (overlapping with Rachel's early Pacific Time hours) by scanning her Outlook. You see three new board
s and a travel confirmation that needs a hotel added. You handle both before she's had her coffee.



You check the RMLA speaker confirmation list — two of next month's speakers haven't responded. You send a follow-up, update the tracker, and draft the agenda for Wednesday's session.



A Buildium alert comes in for the Huntington Beach property — a tenant maintenance request. You log it, contact the plumber Rachel uses, and confirm the appointment. You make a note in the property tracker.



In the afternoon you turn Rachel's voice memo from Sunday's church message into a structured PowerPoint outline she can review and use for her next coaching session. You end the day with her calendar fully prepped for the week ahead and her inbox organized.





What We're Looking For ------------------------



Minimum 4 years of executive assistant or chief-of-staff-level support experience

Demonstrated experience supporting a senior executive across both professional and personal domains

Microsoft Outlook power user — rules, folders, calendar management, contact systems (required)

Genuine proficiency with AI/LLM tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or equivalent) — used regularly, not experimentally

Experience with nonprofit coordination, board support, or community organization management

Property management platform experience (Buildium or similar) a significant advantage

Strong content creation and PowerPoint skills — can turn ideas into polished presentations

Excellent written and spoken English — professional, confident, and clear

Bachelor's degree preferred; advanced degree a differentiator

Long-term mindset — looking for a career relationship, not a contract





Schedule & Compensation ------------------------



Full-time, approximately 40 hours per week

Daily overlap with U.S. Pacific Time required (2–4 hours minimum, morning preferred)

Compensation: $7–$10 USD/hour based on experience — top-tier for the market

Paid monthly via direct bank transfer

Long-term engagement with strong growth potential as trust and scope expand



We invest in the right people. If you're exceptional, you'll be compensated and treated like it.





How to Apply ------------------------



Please submit your application here:







Thank you for taking the time to help us get to know you.

title: Interior Design Construction Documentation Specialist
description:
Job Title: Architect – Interior Design Documentation Specialist (Fully Remote)

Schedule: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM PST, Monday–Friday (12:00 AM – 8:30 AM PH Time)

Company: Alignment Architects Inc., Cupertino, CA

Location: Fully Remote



Company Introduction

Join our fast-growing architectural and design firm based in San Jose, backed by AlphaX RE Capital. We specialize in single-family homes, ADUs, SB9 projects, multi-family dwellings, and light industrial developments. With a full range of real estate services—from land acquisition to project execution—Alignment Architects Inc. offers a dynamic environment for collaboration, technical growth, and design excellence.



Position Overview

 We are seeking a detail-oriented and technically skilled Architect – Interior Design Documentation Specialist to support our residential projects in California. This role focuses on the preparation of high-quality interior design construction documents and post-permit revisions.



 You will play a critical role in translating design intent into precise, buildable drawings, ensuring coordination across disciplines and compliance with applicable codes and standards. This position is ideal for someone with strong documentation experience who thrives in a fast-paced, production-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities

  - Construction Documentation:

 Develop and refine detailed interior design construction documents, including floor plans, reflected ceiling plans (RCPs), elevations, sections, schedules, and interior details. 

  - Technical Coordination:

 Coordinate architectural interiors with structural, MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing), and civil drawings to ensure fully integrated and conflict-free documentation. 

  - Code Compliance:

 Ensure all drawings comply with California building codes, local zoning regulations, and industry standards. 

  - Post-Permit Documentation:

 Prepare supplemental drawings, revisions, and addendums to address plan check comments, RFIs, and construction changes. 

  - Design Translation:

 Accurately translate design concepts, sketches, and markups from designers into clear and precise technical drawings. 

  - Team Collaboration:

 Work closely with architects, interior designers, project managers, and consultants to maintain documentation accuracy and efficiency. 

  - Quality Control:

 Review drawings for completeness, consistency, and constructability prior to submission. 

  - Software Utilization:

 Produce high-quality drawings using industry-standard tools such as Revit, AutoCAD, and Bluebeam.



Qualifications

  - Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Architecture 

  - Experience: Minimum of 3 years in architectural/interior design documentation (residential experience preferred; US projects a plus) 

  - Software Proficiency:

    -  Strong proficiency in Revit & Autocad (required) 

    -  Knowledge of SketchUp and Bluebeam is an advantage 

    -  Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite 

  - Technical Knowledge:

    -  Strong understanding of construction detailing and documentation standards 

    -  Familiarity with MEP and structural coordination 

    -  Knowledge of California codes is a plus 



  - Skills:

    -  Excellent written and verbal English communication 

    -  Strong attention to detail and organization 

    -  Ability to manage multiple deadlines in a fast-paced environment 

    -  Proactive, collaborative, and accountable work ethic

title: UI/UX Designer
description:
# UI/UX Designer — NextGen BPO Projects (Freelance / Part-Time)



## About the Company



NextGen BPO is a technology company building SaaS products across multiple industries. Our active and upcoming projects include:



- **CargoMind Enhance** — A logistics SaaS platform for freight forwarding and customs brokerage companies, including a web dashboard and a Microsoft Outlook Add-in

- **HR & Workforce Management SaaS** — A time tracking and workforce management platform for businesses

- Other current and future internal tools and client-facing web applications



Our products are live in production with real users — you'll be working on something people actually use every day.



## What We're Looking For



A **freelance or part-time UI/UX designer** to help improve the user experience and visual design across our product portfolio. This is a great opportunity for a **fresh graduate or junior designer** looking to build real-world SaaS product experience. Our products are already live and functional — your job is to make them cleaner, more consistent, and easier to use.



You don't need years of industry experience. If you can think through a design problem, use Figma well, and communicate clearly, we'd love to hear from you.



## Scope of Work



### Immediate Priorities

- **UI refresh** — Modernize web dashboards across products (login, navigation, data tables, user management)

- **Constrained-space design** — Improve layout and visual hierarchy in narrow panels and sidebars (e.g. Outlook Add-in taskpane at ~350px wide)

- **Design system / component library** — Create a small Figma component library for consistent buttons, cards, forms, badges, and headers across products



### Ongoing Work

- Design new features before development (wireframes ? mockups ? handoff)

- Improve information density without sacrificing readability

- Ensure accessibility basics (contrast, font sizes, focus states)

- Responsive considerations for web and panel-based interfaces



## Deliverables



- **Figma files** with organized pages, components, and variants

- Design specs with spacing, colors, and typography tokens

- Interaction notes (hover states, transitions, loading states)

- Developer handoff via Figma (inspect mode)



## Requirements



### Must Have

- Working knowledge of **Figma** (components, auto-layout, basic prototyping)

- An eye for clean, readable UI — especially for screens with a lot of information

- Ability to think about **constrained layouts** (sidebars, narrow panels, small viewports)

- A portfolio or project showing your design process — **any dashboard, web app, or SaaS interface counts** (school projects, personal redesigns, or concept work welcome)

- Clear written communication in English



### Nice to Have

- Exposure to B2B, productivity tools, or SaaS design (school projects count!)

- Experience with **Microsoft Office Add-in** design patterns or Fluent UI design system

- Familiarity with design systems or component thinking

- Basic understanding of HTML/CSS — enough to know what's feasible to build

- Interest in HR tech, logistics, or enterprise software



> No industry background needed — we'll give you the context. We care more about how you think through a design problem than what domain you've worked in.



## Tech Context (For Reference)



You won't need to code, but knowing the stack helps you design within constraints:



| Layer | Technology |

|-------|-----------|

| Frontend | Vanilla JS, React, Fluent UI |

| Backend | Node.js / Express |

| Hosting | Microsoft Azure |

| Platforms | Web apps, Microsoft Outlook Add-in |

| Design Tool | Figma | 
v | 
sign



## Engagement Details



| Detail | Info |

|--------|------|

| Type | Freelance / Part-time contract |

| Hours | ~10–20 hrs/week (flexible) |

| Duration | Initial 1–2 month engagement, extendable |

| Location | Remote (any timezone, async-friendly) |

| Communication | Teams, async updates |



## How to Apply



Please share:

1. **Portfolio or project samples** — 2–3 examples of UI work. This can be anything: a dashboard redesign, a SaaS app concept, a school capstone, or a personal project — we just want to see how you approach UI problems

2. **Figma sample** — A link to any Figma file showing components, layouts, or a recent project

3. **Brief intro** — Tell us a bit about yourself and why you're interested in this kind of work

4. **Availability and rate** — Your hourly rate and how many hours per week you can commit

title: Graphic Design & Social Media Strategist
description:
About the Role

We are Keenya Kelly LLC, a fast-moving social media education and strategy brand based in Houston, Texas. We teach entrepreneurs how to grow on TikTok and Instagram and monetize through content. Our founder, Keenya Kelly, is a TikTok and Instagram Growth Strategist with a business built over 10 years.



We are looking for a reliable, creative, and communicative full-time tea
mber who can handle both graphic design and social media management tasks. This is a remote, long-term role for someone who is proactive, meets deadlines, and communicates clearly.



What You Will Do

Graphic Design (approx. 50% of role):

Create social media graphics, banners, thumbnails, and branded templates in Canva

Design promotional materials for launches, webinars, and digital products

Maintain brand consistency across all visual assets

Resize and reformat existing designs for multiple platforms



Social Media Management (approx. 50% of role):

Monitor comments and engage with the community

Experience with Canva (required) — Photoshop or Illustrator a plus

Familiarity with TikTok and Instagram — how the platforms work, what performs well

Strong written English communication skills

Ability to follow brand guidelines and take direction well

Highly responsive to
 and messages — we are a fast-moving team

Organized, reliable, and able to meet deadlines without being chased

Previous experience working with a personal brand or online business is a plus



How to Apply

To be considered for this role, you MUST complete the following short sample task along with your application. Applications without the completed task will not be reviewed.



SAMPLE TASK



Task 1 — Graphic Design

Create ONE social media graphic (1080x1080) in Canva for a fictional post promoting a our course 
. Use any colors and design you like, but make it look professional and eye-catching. Export as a JPG or PNG and attach it to your application.



Design a carousel template that will go well with our brand 
/keenyakelly

Write 2 caption options for the graphic above as if posting to Instagram. Each caption should include a hook, 2–3 sentences of value, a call to action, and 3–5 relevant hashtags.

DESIGN NOTE: Please do not use AI to design these sample task as we are looking for a designer that creates not someone using AI generated content for us.



A Note on Communication

This team moves quickly. We expect our tea
mbers to check
 and messages daily, respond within 24 hours, and complete agreed-upon tasks on time. If you are someone who values clear communication and takes ownership of your work, we would love to hear from you.



We look forward to reviewing your application

title: Senior Business Development Manager (B2B Healthcare & NDIS) - ANZ Market
description:
Senior Business Development Manager (B2B Healthcare & NDIS) - ANZ Market

Location: Remote (Philippines)



Engagement Type: Full-Time Independent Contractor (40 hours per week, Australian Business Hours)



Company: CDM Direct



About Us CDM Direct is a leading provider of outsourced operational support and customer experience solutions. We are currently executing a major expansion across the Australia and New Zealand (ANZ) markets, specifically targeting the Aged Care and National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS) sectors.



We provide high-value, tech-enabled operational support—including our flagship 'Rostering as a Service' (RaaS) solution powered by Zoom Contact Centre AI—to solve severe administrative, financial, and compliance bottlenecks for healthcare providers.



The Role This is not a scripted call centre role. This is a highly strategic, consultative B2B sales position working directly alongside our Australian leadership team.



As our market expansion lead, you will be responsible for driving new business acquisition across the ANZ health sector. You will:

• Conduct highly targeted, unscripted outreach to engage senior business decision-makers (CEOs, CFOs, Partners, and Operations Managers).

• Lead commercial conversations to uncover operational chaos, staffing bottlenecks, and financial pain points.

• Position CDM Direct’s RaaS and outsourced solutions with absolute clarity and commercial credibility.

• Secure "Qualified Meetings" (QMBs) for our senior sales executives, directly driving the top of the revenue pipeline.



The Ideal Candidate (The "Hunter") We are exclusively recruiting Tier 1 B2B sales talent. To succeed in this role, you must possess severe commercial resilience and a genuine "hunter" mentality. You will be dealing with busy executives in a highly regulated industry; you must be comfortable handling objections, navigating gatekeepers, and creating commercial urgency from scratch.



• Minimum 3+ years of proven success in outbound B2B sales, KPO, or SaaS business development.

• Exceptional, polished English communication skills capable of peer-to-peer conversations with Australian C-Suite executives.



• Deep discipline, self-management, and the resilience to execute daily strategic outreach in a remote environment.

• A stable, private home office with reliable high-speed internet.



What We Are NOT Looking For



• Entry-level customer service or call centre agents.

• Telemarketers who rely on rigid scripts.

• Candidates seeking a passive account management role; this is a proactive pipeline-generation position.



Remuneration & Commercial Benefits



We offer a highly lucrative, performance-driven commercial package designed to reward top performers:



• Base Retainer: PHP 85,000 per month.

• Health & Wellbeing: Up to PHP 50,000 annual allowance to fully reimburse the cost of a premium private HMO plan for you and one dependent.

• Year-End Bonus: An annual service bonus equivalent to one month's base fee (13th month), paid in December.

• Activity Bonus: NZ$50 for every Qualified Meeting Booked (QMB) to supplement your income while your pipeline builds.

• Revenue Commission: An uncapped 2.5% commission on the Year 1 Contract Value of closed deals, with an accelerator to 5% for high performance.



• Leave & Lifestyle: You will observe standard Australian public holidays as non-working days without any reduction to your base fee. After 12 months, you are permitted 10 days of planned unavailability per annum.



How to Apply



If you have the resilience and the commercial acumen to drive this expansion, please submit:

1. Your updated CV.

2. A link to your LinkedIn profile.

3. A brief cover letter outlining your most successful experience generating outbound B2B meetings with senior executives.

title: Test Analyst - Remote
description:
We are seeking a detail-focused Test Analyst to support the quality and reliability of our core business systems. In this role, you will help ensure that enterprise applications function as expected by applying structured testing approaches across multiple stages of the development lifecycle.



The ideal candidate brings a solid IT foundation, strong knowledge of both the software development lifecycle (SDLC) and software testing lifecycle (STLC), and the ability to analyze systems thoroughly to identify potential issues before release.



Key Responsibilities:

- Test Planning and Preparation

- Collaborate with business analysts and developers to define testing strategies

- Develop detailed test plans and test cases for new implementations and system enhancements

- Test Execution and Defect Management

- Perform testing across multiple phases including system, integration, regression, and UAT

- Record and track defects, ensuring issues are resolved before release

- Provide regular updates on testing progress and results

- Enterprise System Validation

- Perform thorough testing of ERP systems and related business workflows

- Integration and Data Testing

- Verify data exchanges and message accuracy when testing EDI transactions and API endpoints

- Database Validation

- Use SQL queries to validate backend data and confirm database accuracy

- Continuous Improvement

- Recommend improvements to testing practices, coverage, and overall efficiency



Required Qualifications:

- Minimum 3 years of experience in software testing

- ISTQB Foundation Level certification or higher

- Strong knowledge of system, integration, and regression testing approaches

- Experience testing ERP platforms and EDI integrations/message formats

- Practical experience performing API testing

- Ability to write and execute SQL queries for backend validation

- Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills



Preferred Experience:

- Experience conducting performance testing, including load, stress, or volume testing

- Experience creating and maintaining test automation scripts using Java



Work Schedule :

6:30 AM - 3:00 PM Philippines Time

title: Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist (Remote)
description:
***MUST SUBMIT DISC SCORES AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED***

We are hiring an Inbound Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist to handle warm inbound homeowner leads from people actively searching online to sell their homes.



This role exists to filter, qualify, or disqualify leads before they ever reach our acquisition team.



This is not sales, not cold calling, and not persuasion.



If you are comfortable asking direct questions, enforcing clear criteria, and ending calls professionally when a lead is not a fit, this role may be right for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



Respond to warm inbound homeowner inquiries (no cold calling)



Conduct structured qualification calls using a clear scorecard



Ask direct questions about:



motivation



timeline



property condition



decision-maker status



price expectations



Apply qualification rules consistently



Disqualify early when criteria are not met (this is considered success)



Transfer only clean, well-qualified opportunities to acquisitions



Document outcomes clearly in the CRM



You are evaluated on decision quality and discipline, not call volume.



Work Schedule & Availability (Important)



This role requires full-day availability, not just total hours.



Typical schedule:



4–5 hours work



2-hour break



4–5 hours work



Leads come in throughout the day and require timely follow-up.



This role is not suitable if you need a fragmented or flexible schedule.



Who This Role Is For



You may be a strong fit if you:



Are comfortable asking direct questions



Can say “no” calmly and professionally



Prefer clear rules over improvisation



Stay emotionally steady on calls



Document accurately and follow SOPs



Work well independently in a remote environment



Who This Role Is NOT For



This role is likely not a fit if you:



Are looking for a sales or commission-heavy role



Prefer persuasion over qualification



Dislike enforcing rules



Want flexibility instead of structure



Feel uncomfortable disqualifying friendly sellers



Preferred DISC Tendencies (Not Required, but Helpful)



Moderate Dominance (comfortable leading conversations)



Low–moderate Influence (professional, not sales-driven)



Moderate Steadiness (calm, patient)



Moderate Compliance (respects rules and processes)



High-pressure sales personalities are not a fit.



What We Offer



100% remote role



Consistent warm inbound leads



Clear SOPs, scorecards, and expectations



Stable, long-term opportunity for the right fit



Professional, process-driven team environment



How to Apply



Please include a short answer to this question with your application:



“When would you disqualify a seller who sounds friendly but does not meet your criteria?”



Final Note

title: Video Editor -- Direct Response Ads
description:
We're a supplement brand running direct response ads on Meta and TikTok. We're looking for a full-time video editor who understands what makes ads convert — not just what makes them look good.



You'll work directly with a creative strategist who handles all the copy, scripts, and hook ideas. Your job is to take that direction and bring it to life — sharp editing, smart pacing, strong visual decisions.



Formats we produce:



- Short-form VSLs (30–90 seconds)

- Long-form VSLs (5–15 minutes)

- Image ads

- UGC-style ads



You don't need to be great at all of them — but tell us what you're strongest at in your application.



What's in it for you:



- monthly salary

- Bonuses based on winning ads (your edits drive revenue, you share in it, generally one bonus per each winning ad).

- Work directly with a high-level creative strategist — no guesswork, no random briefs

- Zero micromanagement — hit deadlines and deliver quality, that's all that matters

- Long-term position with growth into Senior Editor / Creative Lead



IMPORTANT: Include the word HOOKS in the first line of your application message so we know you read this entire post.



Requirements:



- Experience editing direct response or performance ads (health/supplement niche is a strong advantage)

- Deep understanding of TikTok and Instagram formats and trends

- Strong skills in hooks, pacing, and storytelling — this is everything

- Experience with AI tools: AI voiceover (ElevenLabs, etc.), AI UGC (HeyGen, Synthesia), AI B-roll (Runway, Kling), AI image generation

- Ability to source and work with B-roll from TikTok and Instagram

- Actively staying current on the latest ad styles and trends

- Can take a script and reference ad and execute with your own creative touch on pacing, transitions, and visuals

- Strong understanding of what makes Meta and TikTok ad creatives perform

- High level of English

- Available full-time



You don't need to:



- Write copy or scripts (handled for you)

- Know media buying or ad accounts

- Be a strategist — we need a killer executor with good creative taste



To apply, send us:



1. Your portfolio — show us your best performing ads (Behance, Google Drive, personal site — anything works)

2. What formats you're strongest at (short VSL, long VSL, image ads, UGC, etc.)

3. What AI tools you currently use

4. A short explanation of why you're the right fit



Applications without a portfolio link will not be reviewed. Non-DR work will be ignored.

title: Medical Administrative Assistant – Back Office (Insurance and General Admin)
description:
36 Hours Per Week | Long-Term Role



Schedule



Monday–Thursday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (1-hour unpaid lunch)

Friday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM EST



You must be fully available and uninterrupted during these hours.



Compensation



$5.50 USD per hour starting

Performance increases based on consistent accuracy, reliability, and workflow discipline.



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based outpatient medical weight loss clinic seeking an experienced Medical Administrative Assistant to support insurance verification, medication prior authorizations, intake processing, and structured back-office administrative workflows.



This is a backend administrative role. It is not front-desk focused and involves very limited patient-facing phone communication. However, clear and professional spoken and written English is required for communication with insurance payers.



This role directly supports billing accuracy and clinic workflow by ensuring that insurance verification, documentation, and authorization tracking are completed precisely and on time.



This is not an entry-level position. We are hiring someone who has already worked in a U.S.-based outpatient clinic and understands insurance and intake workflows without needing training on fundamentals.



Core Responsibilities



• Accountable for accurate insurance verification and benefits breakdown

• Monitor daily clinic schedule to ensure patients are verified prior to visits

• Document benefits clearly and completely inside the EHR

• Medication prior authorization submission, status tracking, and payer follow-up until final determination

• Handle pre-certifications when required

• Maintain organized and audit-ready verification documentation

• EHR inbox management and structured chart updates

• New patient intake processing and chart preparation

• Live and portal-based communication with insurance payers

• Monitor and document patient insurance changes

• Follow written SOPs independently without repeated direction or hand-holding

• Provide structured phone backup coverage during designated periods (e.g., receptionist lunch break)



Required Experience



Minimum 2–3 years working for a U.S.-based outpatient medical clinic



• Commercial insurance verification

• Medicare verification

• Medication prior authorizations

• Experience communicating with payers live and via portal

• Working knowledge of ICD-10 diagnosis codes

• Working knowledge of CPT/HCPCS procedure codes

• Strong understanding of medical terminology



Experience must be verifiable.



Technical Requirements



• Dedicated Windows computer (no Mac)

• Minimum Intel i3 or equivalent, 8 GB RAM

• Stable high-speed internet suitable for VOIP

• Quiet, professional home workspace

• Bluetooth noise-canceling headset

• Proficient with modern EHR systems

• Comfortable with Google Drive, Zoom,
, and VOIP platforms

• Typing speed minimum 50 WPM



Application Requirements



Submit all items together in one complete application:



Resume



• Most recent role listed first

• Include month/year dates

• Include clinic name, city, and state

• If employed by a third-party company, list the specific U.S. clinics you personally supported

Incomplete or poorly formatted resumes will not be reviewed.



30–60 Second Video



• State your full name and location

• List the U.S. clinics you worked for (city, state, specialty, and dates)

• Explain your complete insurance eligibility verification process from start to finish, as if preparing a patient for an upcoming visit

• Describe your experience with medication prior authorizations

• List the EHR systems you have used

• Use the phrase green folder naturally in a sentence

• Confirm you are fully available during our clinic hours



Confirmation Statement



Include this exact sentence in your application:



I meet all computer requirements including Windows computer, minimum hardware standards, stable internet suitable for VOIP, and I use a Bluetooth noise-canceling headset.



Initial and date.



Attention to Detail



The first four words of your application must be: in-network deductible verified correctly



Applicants who fail to follow all requirements exactly will not be reviewed including video requirements. 



Shortlisted candidates will move to Phase 2, which includes aptitude and technical verification assessments.



We are seeking a long-term professional who can independently manage insurance verification and administrative workflows with precision, consistency, and discipline.

Apply today!

s

title: Mass Messaging Specialist
description:
Please Apply Here: 
/
/f/2kz0ma3h-1156/MHHLY4BOXCKVXG8CCW



OVERVIEW

We are looking for a highly disciplined and detail-oriented Messaging Operations Specialist to join our growth team. In this role, you are the engine room of our messaging department — accountable for the flawless execution, scheduling, and delivery of mass messaging campaigns and retention sequences.



You will be handling multiple creator accounts daily, with high message volume.



Your job is to take proven strategy and high-converting copy and ensure it reaches the right audience at the exact right time.



This is a pure execution role — not a strategy or creative position. If you pride yourself on speed, accuracy, and never missing a deadline, this role is built for you.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

> Campaign Execution - Schedule and send all mass messaging across assigned creator accounts based on the daily and weekly plan.

> Funnel Maintenance - Update and manage nudge sequences and automated follow-ups to ensure no lead goes cold.

> Retention Campaigns - Execute re-subscription and win-back campaigns based on targeting and instructions provided.

> Reporting - Track and log execution metrics to ensure all campaigns are deployed accurately and on time.

> SOP Adherence - Follow strict internal workflows to maintain consistency, accuracy, and account safety at all times.



WHO YOU ARE

> Highly Organized - You rely on systems, checklists, and precision. Nothing slips through the cracks.

> Reliable & Fast - You execute quickly without sacrificing accuracy. Deadlines are non-negotiable for you.

> Instruction-Focused - You follow SOPs exactly — no guesswork, no improvisation. You execute what's given.

> Detail-Oriented - You double-check links, pricing, targeting, and timing before every single send.

> Tech-Savvy - You navigate tools and platforms efficiently with a stable setup and reliable internet.





SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE

Performance is measured by three things:

•  On-time campaign execution

•  Zero-error sends

•  Consistent daily output volume



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

> Base Salary $400 – $600 / month (depending on experience)

> Performance Bonus - Based on execution quality, accuracy, and consistency

> Tenure Growth - Salary increases tied to consistent performance over time

> Growth Path - Opportunity to move into QA, QM, or higher operational roles



We invest in people who show up, execute consistently, and take ownership of their output. Strong performers have a clear path to grow within the operation.

mber, and present monthly quality reports to leadership.

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.

WHO YOU ARE

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: Sales Representative
description:
Join a fast-growing US online home goods retailer and enjoy the learning and opportunities that you have while working with us.



We strive to provide 5-star service & shopping assistance to all of our clients, and all of our team is accountable to fulfill this.



We are looking for a Sales Representative who can assist prospective buyers and close online ecommerce sales.



We're only looking for full-time, long-term, ongoing cooperation.



Work schedules available:

8 AM to 4 PM US EST

4 PM to 12 AM US EST



Your work week will be 5 days per week, with 2 days off per week. Days off will be selected with your manager. We will try to accommodate your preferences for which days you like, based on availability.



This role starts ASAP!!



Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them



Requirements:

At least 2 years of experience in sales on the phone

Experience must include both inbound and outbound sales

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Experience in Customer Service on the phone is a nice to have

Experience in the e-commerce (online shopping) industry is nice to have

Home improvement, construction, and gas plumbing industry experience is a plus

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

title: Strategic Operations Partner & Executive Assistant to U.S. Founder
description:
Remote – Philippines  |  Full-Time  |  7:00 AM – 3:00 PM CST  |  Long-Term Growth Role 



This is not a typical EA or VA role. 



You will work directly with the founder of a U.S.-based safety and construction products company. This is a strategic operations role — part Chief of Staff, part systems builder, part execution engine. 



We are an AI-driven company actively building out automated agent teams that handle business functions. You will be part of that build. Not as a developer — as a curious, capable partner who helps research, test, implement, and expand what we’re creating together. 



Our previous EA performed so well we promoted her into sales. We build people up here. 



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

You are a finisher. 



The founder generates ideas, sets direction, and hands things off. You catch them, organize them, build systems around them, and make sure nothing disappears. You don’t need all the information before you start. You move with what you have, figure out the rest, and close the loop without being reminded. 



You are technically curious. 

You have experience with tools like Notion, HubSpot, or similar platforms. When you encounter something new — a tool, a workflow, an AI agent — you explore it, figure it out, and come back with a working answer rather than more questions. 

You think in systems. 

When you do something twice, you build a process so it doesn’t have to be done manually a third time. 

You are practical, not just conceptual. 

You don’t just design systems in theory — you implement them, test them, and make them actually work. 

You are a calm counterweight. 



The founder moves fast and generates more ideas than can realistically be executed in any given week. You capture those ideas, organize them into priorities, and respectfully push back when the calendar is overcommitted or the focus is drifting.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO



The role has two layers. 



Daily Operations 

- Monitor and triage the founder’s inbox and flag what needs attention 

- Manage calendar and protect deep work blocks from low-value meetings 

- Coordinate with a small remote team via Microsoft Teams — catching internal requests directed at the founder, ensuring nothing gets lost, and closing the loop 

- Track follow-ups in HubSpot CRM 

- Run a daily morning brief that gives the founder a clean, scannable view of priorities 



Systems & Build-Out 

- This is where the role gets interesting. You will work alongside the founder to build our company operating system in Notion — SOPs, knowledge bases, project dashboards, call transcript processing, and AI workflow integrations. You will help research tools, test implementations, document what works, and expand our growing AI agent infrastructure. You won’t be doing this alone — you’ll be doing it with the founder as a thought partner and active participant in what gets built. 



If you are genuinely excited by the idea of helping build systems that automate business functions and make the company smarter over time, this role will energize you.  



TECHNICAL BACKGROUND WE'RE LOOKING FOR 

Hands-on experience with one or more of the following matters — not optional: 

- Notion — building databases, dashboards, and SOPs, not just using pages 

- HubSpot or similar CRM 

- Microsoft Teams and Office 

- AI tools — ChatGPT, Claude, or similar — used regularly and with genuine interest in what they can do 



You do not need experience with AI agents specifically. You need genuine curiosity about how they work and the technical aptitude to learn quickly alongside someone who is actively building them. 



WHAT WE CARE MOST ABOUT

Ownership and execution discipline. Everything else is secondary. 

- You finish what you start 

- You close loops without reminders 

- You move forward with 80% of the information and communicate clearly about the other 20% 

- You improve systems without being asked 

- You tell the founder when something doesn’t make sense — calmly, directly, and without drama 



We cannot train ownership. We can train everything else. 



“Batteries Included” — WHAT THAT MEANS HERE

Within 30 days: Inbox and calendar running smoothly, HubSpot follow-ups tracked, internal team coordination flowing without the founder as the bottleneck. 



Within 90 days: Notion is becoming our operational home base, at least one repeatable process is documented and running without founder involvement, and you are making decisions independently within your authority level. 



WORK STRUCTURE

- 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM CST 

- Major Philippine holidays respected 

- U.S. holidays may be catch-up days 

- Camera-ready professionalism required for video calls 

- Results matter more than activity — breaks are self-managed 



GROWTH PATH

This role can grow into operations leadership, AI systems coordination, or strategic project management as the company expands. We reward people who take ownership and build things that last. 



To Apply 

Answer all five questions thoughtfully. Short or generic responses will not be reviewed. 



1.  Describe a time you respectfully disagreed with a manager or employer. What happened and what was the outcome? 

2.  Your boss hands you a new project with minimal instructions and says “figure it out and come back with a plan.” What do you do in the first 24 hours? 

3.  Describe a system or process you built from scratch. What was the problem, what did you build, and what was the result? 

4.  What tools do you currently use to stay organized and manage multiple priorities? Be specific — and tell us how you use AI tools in your daily work if at all. 

5.  What is your expected monthly salary in Philippine Pesos? 



We are looking for the person who reads this and thinks “that’s exactly how I work and exactly what I want to be building.” 



If that’s you — apply.

title: Paralegal/Corporate Lawyer (AU)
description:
Paralegal/Corporate Lawyer (2+ Years Experience)

Offshore X | Supporting Australian Client | Full-time



Offshore X is an Australian-backed business providing high-quality offshore professional services to Australian companies. We are currently seeking a Corporate Lawyer (2+ years' experience) to support a WA-based client, working directly with an experienced Partner.



This is an excellent opportunity to gain exposure to a broad range of corporate, commercial and transactional work in a hands-on environment.



The Role

You will work directly with an Australian Partner, supporting a range of corporate and commercial matters, including:



- Drafting and reviewing commercial contracts and agreements

- Assisting with prospectuses and capital raising documentation

- Assisting on mergers and acquisitions, including drafting transaction agreements, supporting due diligence (DD) programs and transaction execution

- Supporting ASX-related work, including IPOs and compliance

- Assisting with general corporate advice, structuring, and governance matters

- Reviewing legal documentation with a commercial, practical mindset

- Coordinating with internal teams and external stakeholders

This is a hands-on role with direct exposure to an Australian Partner and real transactional work.



About You

- 2+ years' experience in corporate or commercial law

- Strong drafting and document review skills

- Exposure to transactions, due diligence, or capital raising work

- High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple matters

- Strong written English and communication skills

- Commercially minded with a practical approach to legal issues



Why Join Offshore X?

- Work directly with Australian clients and experienced legal professionals

- Exposure to high-quality corporate and transactional work

- Supportive team environment with strong systems and processes

- Long-term role with an established business

- Clear opportunity for development and progression

If you’re looking to build your corporate legal experience and work on meaningful matters with international exposure, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Medical Billing Assistant & Backup Virtual Assistant (Mental Health – SimplePractice)
description: I own a growing behavioral health clinic in the United States and I am looking for an experienced Medical Billing Assistant who can also serve as a backup Virtual Assistant when needed. This position requires strong experience with U.S. mental health billing and the SimplePractice platform. Candidate MUST HAVE WORKED CONSISTENTLY WITH SIMPLE PRACTICE IN ALL ASPECTS. The primary responsibilities include monitoring insurance claims, posting payments from EOBs, verifying insurance benefits through payer portals, tracking patient balances, and following up on unpaid claims. The right candidate must also be comfortable assisting with virtual assistant tasks such as scheduling support, maintaining billing trackers, and helping with administrative tasks when the primary VA is unavailable. Applicants must have prior experience working with a mental health clinic, understand behavioral health billing workflows, and be familiar with navigating multiple insurance payer portals. This is a part-time position for at least 5 hours per day and you must be able to work during U.S. daytime hours. Occasional Saturday availability may be required. Strong organization, attention to detail, and excellent written English are essential. Because this role involves working with protected health information, applicants must understand HIPAA privacy requirements and handle patient information responsibly. To confirm that you read this entire posting, please start your application with the phrase “Balance & Bloom Billing Assistant” and briefly describe your experience with SimplePractice, mental health billing, and the payer portals you have worked with.

title: Acquisition Agent — Real Estate (Warm Inbound Leads)
description:
About the Role

We run a high-volume nationwide real estate acquisitions operation. We generate warm inbound leads from motivated sellers across the U.S. — sellers who already raised their hand. Your job is to call them, build quick rapport, underwrite deals, make offers, and get contracts signed.

This is not a training role. You will be handling live leads from day one.



What You'll Do



Call and text warm inbound seller leads same day — speed matters

Qualify sellers (motivation, timeline, condition, price)

Deliver offers confidently using our script and framework

Handle objections and push toward commitment

Log all activity into our CRM (Podio) in real time

Follow up systematically until the lead is closed or killed

Sign deals — contracts via PandaDoc





Requirements — Non-Negotiable



Minimum 1 year of outbound/inbound sales experience (real estate preferred)

Proven track record of closing deals or converting calls to signed agreements

Strong spoken and written English — no heavy accent

Comfortable making 50–80 calls per day

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
We are seeking a reliable and detail oriented Customer Service Representative to support the daily operations of our Etsy shop. This role will begin with data entry tasks to help you learn our systems, products, and workflow, and will gradually transition into customer service responsibilities as you become familiar with the shop’s operations.

Availability on Saturday, Sunday, and Monday is mandatory for this position.



Responsibilities

• Perform data entry tasks such as updating order information, organizing product details, and maintaining internal records during the initial training phase.

• Respond to customer inquiries on Etsy, including questions about orders, shipping, product details, and shop policies.

• Handle order issues such as delays, address changes, cancellations, and replacements with professionalism and empathy.

• Monitor incoming messages and maintain fast response times that align with Etsy’s customer service standards.

• Resolve customer concerns by investigating issues, coordinating with the shop owner, and providing clear, solution focused communication.

• Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and recurring issues to help improve shop processes.



Requirements

• Proven experience in customer service and administrative/data entry roles.

• Strong written communication skills.

• Excellent problem solving abilities and attention to detail.

• Ability to manage multiple conversations and tasks independently.

• Comfortable working remotely and maintaining consistent availability during agreed upon hours.

• Basic knowledge in Graphic Design and tools such as Photoshop and Canva.

• Must be available to work Saturday, Sunday, and Monday.



Application Instructions

1. To confirm that you have read the full job description, please include the code UTN2026 in your message when applying for this position.

2. Please complete a recorded response portion of the application:

- Open the following document containing the interview questions: 

- Record yourself answering each question. Camera use is optional — audio only recordings are accepted.

- Upload your recording to any platform of your choice (Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, etc.).

- Include the shareable link to your recording in your application message.



If your recorded responses align with what we’re looking for, we’ll reach out to you to further discuss the role.



What We Offer:

• Flexible working hours to suit your productivity.

• Consistent workload throughout the year.

• Growth opportunities as the business expands.

• Occasional performance bonuses.

title: Senior Accountant (Remote)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.





----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Are you a detail-driven accounting professional who thrives on turning complex financial data into accurate, reliable insights that real businesses depend on?



We need a Senior Accountant who acts as the financial backbone of our mission to “Help small businesses play a bigger game.” Reporting to the Accounting & Compliance Lead, you are a trusted steward of our numbers,  someone who uncovers financial risks before they surface, builds airtight records, and maintains the kind of precision and integrity that makes itGenius a firm our clients and team can always rely on.



itGenius is a global, remote-first Google Workspace Partner dedicated to “helping small businesses play a bigger game.” We provide high-level IT support and strategic consulting to thousands of businesses globally. We are a distributed team of 60+ professionals across Australia, the Philippines, and Europe.



Join our team of A-players—if you’re one too, apply now!





? Why You’ll Love Working With Us



We don’t just offer a job—we offer a career with exceptional rewards, growth opportunities, and a people-first culture. Here’s what you’ll get:



???? Competitive Compensation & Bonuses

December Bonus 

Performance Incentive Bonus 

Regular Annual Salary Increases as you grow with us



????? Time Off That Matters

Paid Leaves after regularization 

Paid National/Local Holidays 



???? Work & Life Experiences You’ll Remember

Annual Team Conferences & Events – Travel, food and accommodations on us!



???? Investing in Your Growth

Budget for Training & Development

Career Growth Pathways



???? Support to Help You Thrive

HMO Allowance – Your health is our priority

Government-Mandated Benefits – SSS, PAGIBIG, PhilHealth

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Job Overview:

The Senior Accountant ensures accurate financial reporting, revenue recognition, and compliance within IT Genius’s subscription-based model. This role manages core accounting processes, including A/R, A/P, payroll, and month-end close, while maintaining precision across all financial records and reconciliations.

 

Accountabilities

- General Ledger Integrity & AP Oversight: Accountable for the overall accuracy and integrity of the general ledger and the accounts payable function, ensuring all transactions are correctly recorded and reconciled in a timely manner.



- Tea
ntorship: Accountable for overseeing the work of the Junior Staff Accountant, providing guidance and support to ensure their accuracy and professional development.



- Specialist Team Enablement: Accountable for providing accurate and timely financial data and schedules to enable the Tax & Compliance and Financial Analyst roles to perform their functions effectively.

Closing of books within 7 working days.





Key Responsibilities:



- Revenue Recognition & Contract Accounting:

Manage revenue recognition processes in strict compliance with accounting standards.

Track deferred/unearned revenue and unbilled receivables from subscription billing cycles.

Accurately account for contract changes (upgrades, downgrades, cancellations, renewals) and their impact on revenue schedules.



- Operational Accounting:

Maintain the general ledger and prepare journal entries and reconciliations.

Oversee and reconcile A/P, A/R, and payroll processes.

Reconcile data from the Bill Management Platform (WHMCS) with the general ledger.



- Reporting & Compliance:

Prepare detailed financial reports by subscription tier, product, or segment.

Support timely and accurate preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements (IFRS compliant).

Ensure accurate invoicing for all subscription and usage-based fees, including setup and promotional discounts.



- Month-End Close:

Execute and review journal entries, reconciliations, and variance analyses.

Support Controller in ensuring a smooth and timely monthly close process.



- Audit & Documentation:

Prepare documentation and analysis for revenue and customer contract audits.

Support internal and external audit requirements as needed.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Skills & Qualifications



Required:

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

- Minimum of 3–5 years of progressive accounting experience (including FS preparation and GL review)

- Strong understanding of IFRS and revenue recognition principles

- Proficiency with accounting software (e.g., Xero, QuickBooks, NetSuite) and Google Sheets

- Strong attention to detail, accuracy, and organizational skills

- Excellent communication and time management abilities



It would be nice if you have:

- Experience working in a cloud technology, SaaS business, Web hosting, or reselling business

- Familiarity with subscription or recurring revenue models

- Hands-on experience with WHMCS or similar billing systems

- Knowledge of Google Workspace tools



Work Schedule

- 8-hour shift

- Philippine timezone, morning shift

- Monday to Friday

- Weekends off

- Observance of Philippine holiday

- Permanent Work Form Home



You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:

- The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

- Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

- Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

At itGenius, we need a Sales Consultant who acts as the growth engine of our mission to "Help small businesses play a bigger game." Reporting to the Head of Sales, you are a trusted advisor who uncovers real business needs, crafts ingenious solutions, and builds the kind of trust that makes itGenius an essential part of every client's success.

itGenius is a global, remote-first Google Workspace Partner dedicated to “helping small businesses play a bigger game.” We provide high-level IT support and strategic consulting to thousands of businesses globally. We are a distributed team of 60+ professionals across Australia, the Philippines, and Europe.



Join our team of A-players—if you're one too, apply now!
