title: Sales Closer Wanted — Hot Google Ads Leads | E-Commerce | $4/hr + Commission
description:
E-Commerce Sales & Operations Manager — Home Improvement (Full-Time, Remote)



$4.00/hour + Commission (top performers earn $1,000+/month)



————————————————————————



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are The Trade Table (
), a growing home improvement e-commerce company selling premium brands like Victory, Sauna Life, Kamado Joe, Masterbuilt, ILVE, Capital, Sandia, and more. We are looking for a driven, sales-focused operations manager to help us scale to $30K–$50K+ in monthly revenue.



This is not a virtual assistant role. This is a sales-first operations role where your #1 job is converting leads into orders. We generate high-quality inbound leads through Google Ads — your job is to follow up, build relationships, and close deals on high-ticket home improvement products ($500–$6,000+ per order, $17K being the highest all time).



We have the leads. We have the brands. We have the ad engine. We need someone who can close.



————————————————————————



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:



- You have real e-commerce experience (Shopify preferred)

- You are confident on the phone and can close sales

- You thrive under pressure and want to earn based on performance

- You want to grow with a company, not just fill a seat



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:



- You prefer quiet backend work over sales calls

- You need hand-holding and constant direction

- You shy away from targets and accountability

- You see this as "just a VA job"



————————————————————————



WHAT YOU'LL DO (In Priority Order)



Your #1 job is SALES. Everything else is secondary.



1. Order Processing (Highest Priority) — When an order comes in, you process it immediately. Submit to distributor, confirm with manufacturer, verify lead time, update customer. Orders are revenue. Nothing delays this.



2. Lead Follow-Up — Every open lead gets worked until they buy, decline, or are disqualified. Phone, text,
. Leads never sit idle. You follow up relentlessly.



3. Cold Outreach — Minimum 20 business-to-business calls per day. The goal is conversations that generate new sales opportunities.



4. Brand Outreach — Minimum 5 brand/dealer calls per day. We are constantly adding new brands to our catalog. Find the brand, call them, secure dealer access.



5. Secondary (only after sales work is done) — Shipping and order tracking, YouTube channel management, supplier research for future product lines, hiring support.



What you will NOT do: Product uploads, catalog management, collection work. We have a separate tea
mber for that.



————————————————————————



COMPENSATION



Base Pay: $4.00/hour USD



Commission (per order — this is where it gets exciting):



We want you to earn well. Our commission structure rewards closers, especially on big orders.



Each order gets a $100 Google Ads cost allocation. Your commission is based on Real Profit (Revenue minus Product Cost minus Shipping minus Fees minus $100). The more profitable the order, the more you earn ($100 minimum profit):



Under $100 Real Profit = $5 flat

$100 – $300 Real Profit = 7% of Real Profit

Over $300 Real Profit = 10% of Real Profit



Important: The company keeps a minimum of $100 profit on every order. If the commission would bring profit below $100, it gets capped. This only affects mid-range orders — on big orders you always get the full percentage.



Real examples from our order history:



$839 Range Hood — Real Profit $77 — Your Commission: $5.00

$1,424 Range Hood — Real Profit $129 — Your Commission: $9.01

$2,199 Range Hood — Real Profit $214 — Your Commission: $14.95

$2,919 Sauna Stove — Real Profit $235 — Your Commission: $16.46

$5,473 Sauna/Heater — Real Profit $742 — Your Commission: $74.22

$6,140 Hot Tub — Real Profit $867 — Your Commission: $86.72



One big order can pay $75–$90+ in commission. We get these opportunities regularly — we need someone who can close them.



Weekly Performance Bonus (weekly revenue target: $7,500):



Hit $7,500+ = +$10

Every $1,000 over $7,500 = +$10 more

$5,000 – $7,500 = No deduction

$2,500 – $5,000 = -$2.50

Under $2,500 = -$5.00



What your total monthly earnings look like:



$15,000 in monthly revenue = ~$835/month total pay

$20,000 in monthly revenue = ~$886/month total pay

$25,000 in monthly revenue = ~$928/month total pay

$30,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,010/month total pay

$35,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,052/month total pay

$50,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,192/month total pay



At $30K+ in monthly revenue, you are earning $5.75+/hour effective rate with room to grow as the business scales. Our goal is $50K–$100K+/month, and your earnings grow with us.



————————————————————————



REQUIREMENTS



Must have:



- E-commerce experience (Shopify strongly preferred)

- Sales experience — you have closed deals before, not just processed orders

- Strong English communication (written and verbal — you will be on the phone with US customers)

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace for phone calls

- Available 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central US Time (CST), Monday – Friday

- Self-motivated — you will be the only person on sales daily



Strongly preferred:



- Experience with home improvement, appliance, or high-ticket product sales

- Familiarity with Google Ads lead funnels

- Experience with CRM or lead tracking systems

- Comfortable making outbound cold calls



————————————————————————



ABOUT US



The Trade Table is a home improvement e-commerce company with dealer relationships with 100+ brands. We have been in business for 4 years, generated $334K+ in lifetime revenue, and are growing fast — revenue was up 65% year-to-date.



We run highly efficient Google Ads campaigns (25x+ ROAS) that generate a strong pipeline of inbound leads. Our biggest gap is converting those leads into closed orders. That is exactly what this role is built to solve.



We are a small, fast-moving team. You will work directly with the owner and have a real impact on the company's growth. This is not a corporate job — this is a ground-floor opportunity with a company that is scaling.



Our brands include: Victory, Sauna Life, Kamado Joe, Masterbuilt, ILVE, Capital, Sandia, HUUM, Hooga, Sports Attack, and many more.



————————————————————————



HOW TO APPLY



 
 with subject line "$100K/month Ecom Closer"



1. A brief message about your e-commerce and sales experience

2. Resume

3. Your IQ test result from: 
/take-the-test/ (free version is
ed to you)

4. voice recording



Bonus: If you have examples of sales results you've driven (revenue numbers, conversion rates, etc.), include them. We value results over resumes.



————————————————————————



INTERVIEW PROCESS



1. Application review

2. Initial interview (video call)

3. Final interview (video call)

4. Trial period (paid)



We move fast. If you're the right fit, you could be starting within days.

title: Real Estate VA (Listing Coordinator)
description:
Are you the detail-oriented, deadline-driven Real Estate Listing Coordinator we’ve been looking for?

We’re hiring a Remote Real Estate Listing Coordinator to support our U.S.-based real estate business. This is a work-from-home position where you’ll manage listings from onboarding to active status, ensure accuracy across platforms, and keep all listing-related tasks on track.



If you’re highly organized, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and enjoy keeping listings compliant and up to date, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities:

- Coordinate new listings from onboarding through activation and updates.

- Enter, manage, and update listings in MLS and other listing platforms.

- Collect, organize, and maintain listing documents, disclosures, and property details.

- Coordinate with agents, sellers, photographers, and vendors.

- Track listing deadlines and ensure compliance with MLS and brokerage requirements.

- Make price changes, status updates, and listing revisions as needed.

- Maintain accurate records and communicate listing updates to the team.



What We’re Looking For:

- Prior experience as a Real Estate Listing Coordinator that worked for A US Real Estate company is a MUST.

- Familiarity with MLS systems and real estate listing workflows.

- Fluent in spoken & written English (must keep up with natural conversation).

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

- Tech-savvy and comfortable working across multiple tools and platforms.

- Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision.



What You’ll Gain:

- A long-term, remote role with stable workload.

- Opportunity to work closely with a U.S.-based real estate team.

- Hands-on experience managing real estate listings end-to-end.

- Meaningful work where your accuracy and organization directly impact success.

title: Salesforce Administrator
description:
COMPANY: MVP MAILHOUSE

Located in Park City, UT, MVP Mailhouse is a leader in direct marketing and analytics that drive ROI, specializing in the dental industry. Read more about MVP Mailhouse’s products and services on our website: 
/.



MVP Mailhouse’s flagship product is direct mail marketing with unexpectedly advanced technology. We track all the phone calls and new customer conversations that our marketing campaigns generate for our customers and help them use that data to increase performance. We have started offering digital ad campaigns on Google and
 to help our customers maximize their growth.



MVP Mailhouse uses proprietary technology including native mobile and web-based applications to make our customer experience more streamlined and effective and to help practices achieve their growth goals.



TEAM: PRODUCT and ENGINEERING

Our development team uses kanban and Scru
thodologies to manage our workflow. Our stack is React for web, Node.js back end, Mongo DB, and several REST APIs for other functionality.



The focus of the product and engineering team is building cross-device compatible user interfaces that communicate effectively and make action painless and instinctual. Our entire team is laser focused on understanding our customers’ problems, preferences, and feedback in order to build a product that they love and helps fuel our company’s growth.



POSITION: SALESFORCE ADMINISTRATOR

The Salesforce Administrator will take part in the design, development, and support of the various platforms in the organization. The position will interact with business users, IT resources, and provide advanced in-depth CRM administration and design. The successful hire will support multiple business divisions and collaborate with stakeholders to shape CRM requirements, integration, and ensure alignment with business and IT strategy.



You will also be responsible for designing the system, training employees on the system, troubleshooting software problems, and making improvements to the system over time.



Our system is based on the following software:



- Salesforce

- GSuite (Gmail, Drive, Calendar, etc)

- Quickbooks

- Zapier



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Help develop and execute the technical roadmap for CRM and system integration, working closely with system users to leverage the platform further to develop and achieve the aim of the CRM and its full integration to the organization’s processes

- Evaluate and configure CRM and other systems

- Training users and creating useful documentation

- Drive user adoption of newly implemented features and functionality; increase the utilization of the CRM through user engagement, develop CRM workflows to support business processes, extract data, produce tailored reports and respond to members’ information requests

- Ensure proper integration of various systems and automation platforms

- Play a strategic consulting role during the planning of various marketing campaigns both at the level of targeting as well as that of business intelligence

- Develop and administer CRM marketing lists, maintaining the data records of all membership engagements and prospective membership including all relevant key contacts, ensuring data supplied is up to date



REQUIREMENTS:

- Bachelor’s degree; preferably in business or technology-related field

- Solid years of professional experience in IT and/or related business experience

- Extensive experience in configuring Salesforce and other CRMs using workflows, validation rules, roles & profiles, reports, and dashboards with demonstrated advanced proficiency

- Proven ability to develop a clear understanding of internal clients’ needs and the capability to incorporate them into processes and solutions

- A good facilitator with a strong personality and relationship management ability to communicate, influence and collaborate with multiple stakeholders



DETAILS TO CONSIDER BEFORE SENDING YOUR APPLICATION:

- REQUIRED WORKINGS HOURS: US business hours (PH night shift)

- Status: Full-time (~40 hrs per week); 8 hours per day excluding breaks

- Candidate must be open to using a time tracking app while working

- Weekend offs

- Location: Virtual team (work from home)



BENEFITS:

- 11 Paid regional/religious holidays per year

- 12 PTO days per year (accrued incrementally with pay periods)

- Healthcare reimbursement for a tea
mber

- 13th-month bonus (prorated by service length)

- Monthly internet reimbursement

- Quarterly performance bonus

title: Social Media Marketing Assistant
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-growing influencer marketing agency based in the US working with major wellness brands on TikTok Shop creator campaigns. We are looking for a warm, organized, and proactive Full-Time Virtual Assistant to manage the onboarding and day-to-day community experience for our Wellness Partner creator program.

This is a people-first role. Your job is to make every new creator feel personally welcomed, fully set up, and excited to be part of our community. You will be the first point of contact for hundreds of creators joining our
 community, and your warmth and attention to detail will directly impact how engaged and successful they are.



What You Will Do

Welcome every new creator who joins our
 community with a personal message within 30 minutes of them joining

Send personalized 1-on-1 DMs to every new member within 24 hours of them joining

Follow up with new creators to make sure they are set up on TikTok Shop (collab invites, product showcase, content posting)

Post Zoom call links before our daily community calls (Monday to Friday, 7:00 PM EST) and replay links after each call

Monitor the community group throughout the day and respond to questions, comments, and messages

Track which new members have been welcomed and followed up with using a simple spreadsheet

Escalate any complaints, product issues, or sensitive situations to your manager immediately

Help maintain a positive, warm, and active community culture



What We Are Looking For

At least 1 year of experience in customer service, community management, or social media management

Excellent written English - you must be able to write warm, natural, conversational messages that do not sound copy-pasted or robotic

Familiarity with TikTok and TikTok Shop (experience with creator programs or affiliate marketing is a big plus)

Experience using
 (or ability to learn quickly)

Highly organized and reliable - this role requires showing up every day and following a checklist without being reminded

Available to work evenings Philippine time (7:00 PM EST = 7:00 AM PHT the following day) at least 5 days a week

Proactive communicator - you flag problems before they become issues and ask questions when unsure

Genuinely warm and people-oriented - you enjoy making others feel good



Nice to Have

Experience working with influencers, content creators, or UGC campaigns

Experience with TikTok Shop affiliate or creator programs

Experience managing
 groups or communities



Schedule

Full-time, 30 hours per week. Monday to Friday. Must be available for the daily 7:00 PM EST call window (posting links, monitoring chat during the call).

Why Work With Us

Fully remote, work from home

Long-term stable position with room to grow

Supportive team environment - you will have a direct manager (Bella) who is always available to guide you

You will be part of an exciting, fast-growing creator community in the wellness space

Competitive salary based on experience



How to Apply

Please send us a short voice or video message (1-2 minutes) introducing yourself and telling us why you would be great at this role. Written applications without a voice or video message will not be considered.



Send to my assistants Telegram: @bellamaria120



Also include:

Your resume or work history

2-3 examples of customer service or community messages you have written in the past (screenshots are fine)

We are looking for someone who genuinely loves people and takes pride in making others feel welcome. If that sounds like you, we would love to hear from you.

title: Video Editor for Short Form Content (Reels / TikTok / YouTube Shorts) - Personal brand
description:
I’m looking for a video editor who understands short-form content for personal brands.



This is not about heavy animations or fancy effects.

It’s about clean editing, strong storytelling, and making content perform.



You’ll be editing content for:

- Instagram Reels

- TikTok

- YouTube Shorts



What I need:

- Clean cuts (no unnecessary fluff)

- Strong pacing (keep attention high)

- Good understanding of storytelling

- Solid color grading (this matters)

- Subtitles/captions (basic, clean)



No over-editing. No gimmicks. Just sharp, effective content.



Important:

I also want you to think along in how content should be filmed.

Not just editing — but understanding what makes a video work.



Structure:

- Paid per reel: $5 per edited video

- I’ll send you a sample video to edit first

- If it’s good ? we continue

- If we work well together ? potential long-term contract



To apply:

- Send your portfolio (short-form content only)

- Keep it simple

I’ll share examples of the style I’m aiming:

title: experienced editor
description:
Video Editor — Good & Tasteful Agency

Remote | Philippines-Based Preferred | Contract



---



About Us



Good & Tasteful is a restaurant-focused social media marketing agency based in Atlanta, Georgia. We help restaurants grow their brand, fill seats, and build loyal communities through high-quality short-form content. We move fast, we care about craft, and we only work with clients we can actually win for.



---



The Role



We're looking for a creative, experienced Video Editor to join our contractor team on an ongoing basis. You'll be editing short-form content — primarily Instagram Reels and TikToks — for restaurant clients across the U.S. This role moves at a fast pace, and we need someone who thrives in that environment without sacrificing quality. Creativity isn't a bonus here — it's the job.



---



What You'll Be Doing



- Editing short-form vertical video (Reels, TikToks) from raw footage provided by our videographers

- Bringing a strong creative eye to every edit — pacing, color grading, transitions, text, and sound all work together to tell a story

- Adding captions, text overlays, and motion elements that match each client's brand identity

- Delivering polished, post-ready content consistently and on deadline

- Taking direction from creative briefs while also bringing your own creative instincts to the table

- Maintaining a high standard of professionalism in every deliverable



---



What We're Looking For



- 3+ years editing short-form social content — restaurant, food, or lifestyle brands strongly preferred

- A genuine creative eye — you don't just cut footage, you craft content that stops the scroll

- Proven ability to work at a fast pace without letting quality slip

- Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

- Professional, reliable, and communicates clearly — no chasing required

- Portfolio or sample reel that shows range, creativity, and consistency



---



The Details



- Contract role — monthly arrangement

- Remote, Philippines-based candidates strongly preferred

- Compensation based on experience and output volume

- Long-term opportunity for the right person as we continue to scale



---



To Apply



Send your portfolio/reel and a brief intro. Tell us what editing software you use, share examples of your best work, and let us know how many short-form videos you can comfortably deliver per week.

title: Level 3 - System Administrator & Client Relationship Lead
description:
Job Title: Level 3 – System Administrator & Client Relationship Lead 

Work Setup: Fully Remote 

Work Schedule: Monday – Friday, Pacific Standard Time 

Salary: $3,300 - $3,700 



Role Overview 

The person in this role will own both the technical infrastructure and the client experience for a portfolio of customer accounts, many of whom are technologically sophisticated, cutting-edge software startups and security-conscious VC firms. This role is also the senior technical authority that clients rely on, and they need to be someone a non-technical founder trusts as much as a technical CTO respects. 

If you are the type who can diagnose a security i
, explain what happened to an operations manager in plain language, and leave that person feeling confident, not confused, then YOU belong here. 



 This Role IS: 

The face of our company to technologically sophisticated, security-conscious clients — you own relationships, not just tickets 

Equal parts technical problem-solving and warm, clear client communication 

A Mac-first, Google Workspace-first, SaaS-security environment 

Autonomy with accountability — startup clients expect fast, independent judgment 



This Role IS NOT: 

A backend NOC or infrastructure role where you work silently behind the scenes 

A pure engineering role — if you prefer zero client contact, this is not the right fit 

A Windows Server / Active Directory / on-prem data center environment 

A role with heavy supervision and rigid escalation paths 



Responsibilities: 

Technical Delivery 

Own the deployment, configuration, and lifecycle management of our security tool stack (SentinelOne, Okta, Entra ID, Cynomi, KnowBe4, etc.) across client environments. 

Provide Tier 2 and Tier 3 support for escalated issues across Mac workstations, networks, Google Workspace, and SaaS platforms. 

Troubleshoot and resolve i
 independently with clear, client-readable documentation. 

Lead technical projects: migrations, security tool rollouts, network upgrades, compliance implementations. 

Develop process automation to reduce repetitive manual work (not infrastructure-as-code; think workflow efficiency). 

Own recurring technical issues and implement long-term root-cause fixes. 

Support monitoring, patching (including CVE remediation alerting), and i
 response workflows. 

Evaluate new platforms to determine their suitability as part of our tool stack. 

Perform system updates, backups, and security audits. 



Client Experience 

Serve as the primary technical point of contact for assigned client accounts. You own the relationship, not just the ticket queue. 

Translate complex technical concepts into clear, confident language for non-technical stakeholders (startup founders, ops managers, office managers). 

Lead client-facing project presentations: scoping, status updates, and post-implementation reviews. 

Collaborate with Tier 1 and Tier 2 tea
mbers to share knowledge and elevate the team’s client communication standards. 

Bridge the gap between subject matter experts and end-users – ensure that SOPs, documentation, and client-facing instructions are user-friendly and accessible. 

Identify opportunities to improve service delivery and proactively communicate them to clients and internal leadership. 

Contribute to and improve knowledge base documentation with a client-readability lens. 



Required Qualifications 

Technical Qualifications 

10+ years of experience in IT support, systems administration, and security project implementation. 

Strong Mac/macOS support experience. Candidates without extensive Apple experience must obtain Apple Desktop Support certification within 90 days. 

Experience administering Google Workspace environments for distributed/remote teams. 

Strong cybersecurity literacy: hands-on experience with zero-trust SaaS security platforms (SentinelOne, Okta, Entra ID, Cisco Umbrella, KnowBe4, or equivalent). 

Solid networking fundamentals (VPNs, firewalls, routing), ideally supporting Cisco Meraki environments. 

Experience with endpoint management / MDM tools (Jamf, Intune, or similar). 

Demonstrated experience leading SaaS security implementation projects end-to-end: from scoping and proposal through deployment and client sign-off. 



Client-Facing Skills?(Equally Weighted) 

Demonstrated experience as the primary point of contact for client accounts – not just an escalation resource, but the person the client calls first. 

Proven ability to explain technical issues to non-technical audiences in plain language and leave them feeling confident, not overwhelmed. 

Experience leading or co-leading client meetings, project kickoffs, and status reviews. 

High customer satisfaction scores or equivalent evidence of strong client relationships (references, testimonials, NPS). 

Comfort with ambiguity: startup clients often don’t know what they need, and you help them figure it out. 



Soft Skills 

Ownership mindset – if it’s your account, it’s your problem until it’s solved. 

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision across multiple time zones. 

Continuous improvement orientation: you don’t just fix the ticket, you fix the system that created the ticket. 

Strong written communication – client-facing
s and documentation should be clear, professional, and warm. 



Benefits:

a. 13th Month pay

b. Health Stipend

c. Government Contribution Allowance

d. Personal Time Off (PTO)

title: Rockstar Meta Ads Creative Designer (Direct Response | US Female Audience)
description:
IMPORTANT

Any application that does not follow all instructions or is missing any requirement listed below will not be reviewed.



ABOUT US



We are a fast growing US based brand focused on scaling through paid social, primarily Meta 
 and Instagram). Our target audience is US female consumers, and our growth is driven heavily by high performing creatives.



We are looking for a Rockstar Ads Creative Designer who understands what actually converts, not just what looks good.



If you know how to create scroll stopping ads, understand hooks, and can design creatives that perform well within Meta’s algorithm, this role is for you.



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will be responsible for creating high converting ad creatives for Meta platforms. This includes static images, carousels, and short form video ads.



This is a performance driven role. Your success will be measured by how well your creatives perform, not just how they look.



We are not looking for a traditional graphic designer. We are looking for someone who understands direct response marketing and ad psychology.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



• Design high converting static and video ad creatives for
 and Instagram

• Develop multiple creative variations for A B testing

• Create strong hooks and visual concepts tailored to US female audiences

• Analyze winning ads and iterate based on performance data

• Collaborate with the team on creative strategy and testing angles

• Stay up to date with current Meta ad trends and formats

• Turn briefs into compelling, conversion focused creatives quickly



REQUIREMENTS



• Minimum 2 to 4 years experience creating Meta ad creatives

• Proven track record of ads that have performed well (high CTR, ROAS, or conversions)

• Strong understanding of direct response marketing principles

• Experience designing for US audiences, especially female demographics

• Proficiency in tools like Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, CapCut, or similar

• Ability to create both static and video creatives

• Strong English comprehension for understanding briefs and messaging

• Fast turnaround time and ability to produce multiple creatives consistently

• Reliable internet and professional work setup



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



We want someone who thinks like a marketer, not just a designer.



You should understand:

• Hooks and thumb stopping visuals

• Consumer psychology and buying triggers

• What makes an ad convert vs just look aesthetic

• How to iterate based on data, not guesswork



If you have worked with winning ads before and can show results, you will stand out immediately.



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To be considered, please include the following:



1. Links to 3 to 5 ad creatives you have made that performed well (include metrics if available)

2. Brief explanation of why those ads worked

3. Your portfolio or sample work

4. Your favorite brand currently running great Meta ads and why

5. Write “CREATIVE ROCKSTAR” in the subject line



Any application that does not follow all instructions or is missing any requirement above will not be reviewed.

title: AI Animation Specialist | Growth designer / editor learning oppertunity
description:
AI Animation Specialist — Image-to-Video & Lipsync

Performance Marketing | Global E-Commerce Brand | Full-Time





The Role



We're hiring a full-time AI Animation Specialist to own one focused workflow: taking AI-generated images and bringing them to life as video ads — complete with lipsync and natural movement — ready for live paid campaigns.



This role is 100% Kling. No traditional video editing, no filming, no graphic design. Just deep, daily mastery of the AI pipeline that turns static images into high-converting video creatives.





The Workflow You'll Own



1. Receive AI-generated images

You'll be handed character images (full-body shots, headshots, multi-angle faces) produced by the team's AI image pipeline. Your job starts here.



2. Build the character in Kling

- Upload images from multiple angles to construct a consistent AI character

- Upload voice audio to bind voice to character

- Define character name and parameters for reuse across campaigns



3. Break the script into segments

- Divide scripts into 3–8 second parts

- Match Kling generation length to each audio segment



4. Animate and lipsync

- Generate clips using Kling Video 3.0

- Use matched start/end frames to keep the character visually consistent

- Apply clean, precise prompts to control movement and style



Example prompt: "Single continuous shot. Natural handheld iPhone style. No cuts. No zoom. Make the person speak the dialogue: [text]"



5. QC every clip before it leaves your hands

- Natural hand gestures and body movement

- Accurate lipsync and pronunciation

- Realistic camera motion — no unwanted zoom

- No glitches in face, hands, or mouth

- No background audio bleed

- Smooth transitions between segments for the editor



If it doesn't pass, you don't ship it. You regenerate and improve.





This Role Is Purely Kling



You will not be doing anything outside of Kling-based production. Every part of the workflow — animation, lipsync, character generation, voiceover sync — happens inside Kling.



We want someone who is fully immersed in this one tool and committed to mastering it completely. Your entire focus is making this pipeline faster, better, and more consistent every single day.





The Environment



You'll work inside a dedicated AI content team alongside 8+ creatives and a broader marketing department of 17+. The team ships and tests daily. Feedback loops are short. Iteration is constant.



Honest expectations: This role requires 60 to 70 hours per week with regular availability 7 days a week. Only apply if you're genuinely ready for that output level.





Who We're Looking For



Experience with Kling or AI tools is a plus but not required. What matters far more is who you are as a person and how you work.



- Extremely proactive — you don't wait to be told, you figure it out and get it done

- Hard working — you take pride in volume and quality, not one or the other

- Highly available — you're online, responsive, and showing up consistently

- Detail-obsessed — you notice when something looks off and you fix it without being asked

- Fast learner — you pick up new tools and workflows quickly and improve with every iteration

- Fully committed — this is not a side job, it's your main focus and you treat it that way



We're not looking for someone with all the answers. We're looking for someone hungry, coachable, and ready to put in the work.





What You'll Gain



The reality is that AI is replacing traditional video editing and graphic design faster than most people expect. This role is a direct entry point into the skillset that is taking over.



If you're a video editor or designer who sees the shift happening and wants to get ahead of it rather than be replaced by it, this is how you do it. You will spend every working day inside the tools and workflows that are becoming the new standard for creative production.



By the time most people in your field figure out they need to learn this, you'll already have hundreds of hours of real production experience behind you — working on live campaigns for a global brand, not just experimenting on your own.



This is not a course. This is not practice. This is the real thing, and it will put you years ahead.





How to Apply



Apply directly through OnlineJobs and send us a message introducing yourself.



If you have a portfolio or any examples of AI animation, lipsync, or image-to-video work — polished or experimental — please include a link or attach them to your message. It's not required, but it will significantly strengthen your application.

title: Join the 'Disney' of Short-Stays as a Concierge Team Member
description:
We are the Disney of the short-stay industry.



Every stay is designed, choreographed, and delivered with the same intention you’d expect from a world-class global brand — where emotion matters, details matter, and the experience is remembered long after check-out.



This role is not customer support.

It is not a script-reading position.

It is not a place to hide behind automation.



We are looking for real brand ambassadors, people who understand that how something is said matters just as much as what is said.



--------------------



The Role

As a Concierge, you are the living expression of the brand.



You are the voice guests trust.

You are the tone they remember.

You are the reason a stay feels thoughtful, intentional, and human.



Guests are not interacting with software or templates.

They are interacting with you, and through you, the brand.



--------------------



What You’ll Be Responsible For

1. Serve as the primary point of contact for guests before, during, and after their stay

2. Deliver warm, confident, articulate communication across booking platforms, phone,
, and SMS

3. Represent the brand’s values, tone, and standards in every interaction

4. Ensure each guest experience feels seamless, considered, and personal

5. Resolve guest issues (A/C, Wi-Fi, access, appliances, etc.) calmly and decisively

6. Coordinate solutions with cleaning, maintenance, and building teams

7. Communicate disruptions or building notices with clarity and professionalism

8. Take ownership of outcomes, not just messages

9. Maintain a deep understanding of each property’s layout, features, and nuances

10. Coordinate with housekeeping teams to ensure spaces are guest-ready at all times

11. Speak confidently and accurately about each space and its surroundings

12. Maintain clear guest notes, handovers, and internal updates

13. Work in rhythm with the wider team to deliver consistency at scale



-----------------------



Non-Negotiables



1. Fluent English is essential.

You must communicate clearly, confidently, and naturally — both written and spoken.



2. No AI-generated guest communication.

ChatGPT or similar tools are not permitted for guest interactions.

This brand is built on real conversations with real people.



3. You represent something bigger than yourself.

This role requires pride, presence, and care in how you show up every day.



4. This is a role in a brand.

We are selective because every person in this position shapes how the world experiences us.



------------------------



Video Application (Required)



All applicants must submit a short video answering:



1. Who you are and how you present yourself

2. Your experience in hospitality or short-term stays (if any)

3. What being a brand ambassador means to you

4. If you were told you were joining the Disney of the short-stay industry, how would that change the way you approach your work?

title: Digital Marketing & Lead Generation Specialist (SEO, Website, Email)
description:

We simplify complex systems, build strong networks, and drive initiatives that create real impact. As we grow, we are investing in digital strategies to increase awareness, engagement, and lead generation.

/Instagram ads

 campaigns, newsletters, and announcements

5. Graphic Design

           >
 campaigns

           > Infographics

6. Light Recruiting Support

Requirements

1. Proven experience in digital marketing and lead generation

2. Strong understanding of:

3. Landing pages & conversion optimization

4. SEO

5.
 marketing

3.
 engagement & conversions

This Role Is For You If

Work Setup

How to Apply

title: Long-Form YouTube Documentary Video Editor / Motion Graphics
description:
Please read this entire post before applying.



Start your application with the word PEPSI349 so I know you pay attention to detail. Applications without this word will be ignored.



I am building a new YouTube channel called Brand Misfire for a US audience. The channel focuses on premium long-form business documentaries about major brand failures, marketing disasters, and corporate misfires.



The editing style should feel closest to channels like CoreSight, MagnatesMedia, and partially ColdFusion:

- cinematic and controlled

- strong hooks and retention

- clean pacing

- premium motion graphics

- tasteful sound design

- not generic social media editing



This is NOT a simple cut-and-caption job.



I am looking for an editor who can help create polished long-form documentary videos using a combination of:

- strong story-driven editing

- motion graphics / After Effects work

- licensed stock and archival sourcing

- clean typography and infographic-style visuals

- cinematic sound design

- high attention to detail



What I provide:

- a fully written English script

- a finished English voiceover

- clear creative direction

- references, structure, and very specific instructions



What you will do:

- edit long-form YouTube documentary videos

- source strong licensed footage, archive, and visual material

- build clean motion graphics, number graphics, and documentary-style visual explanations

- use sound design with restraint and purpose

- create a premium final cut, not just a basic timeline assembly



Important:

I am NOT looking for a shorts editor, TikTok editor, or fast template-based social media editor.

I am looking for someone who understands long-form pacing, documentary storytelling, and polished visual packaging.



Project structure:

- start with 2 videos per month

- paid test first

- then 1 pilot video

- if the fit is strong, this can become ongoing long-term work

- budget can grow if the channel performs well and the quality is right



Budget:

- paid test: $40 for editing the first 80 seconds

- ongoing rate to start: $175 per video

- initial workload: 2 videos per month



To apply, please send:

1. the word PEPSI349

2. 1 or 2 of your BEST examples that are closest to premium documentary / motion graphics work

3. confirmation that you are comfortable with the paid test and starting budget



Please do not send wedding videos, gaming edits, or mostly short-form social media work unless your documentary-style work is clearly stronger.



I am looking for a creative partner who can help build something serious and high quality from the start.

title: Real Estate Closing/Listing Coordinator
description:
THIS IS A FULL-TIME OPPORTUNITY AND WE DO NOT ALLOW OUR VIRTUAL PROFESSIONALS TO HAVE OTHER ONGOING VA-TYPE JOBS WHILE WORKING FOR US. Cain Realty Group is seeking to grow its Success Team by hiring an additional Administrative Assistant to serve both our home-buying and home-selling clients. There is a clear path to growth and the opportunities that could come from this role are limitless. For the Administrative Assistant role, we are only considering applicants with residential real estate experience in some capacity.



The perfect candidate for this role is a Virtual Professional that has worked as a transaction coordinator and/or a listing coordinator for another Realtor or real estate team in Texas, preferably with Keller Williams. We will consider those that have worked in this capacity for Realtors in other states, yet it would be helpful to have someone with knowledge of Texas documents. WE WILL ONLY INTERVIEW THOSE WITH RESIDENTIAL REAL ESTATE EXPERIENCE OF AT LEAST ONE YEAR.



Health Insurance is also provided through reimbursement after six months, and annual performance reviews are conducted to determine whether or not a raise has been earned. We take care of our people and are looking for long-terms Virtual Professionals.



We'd also like you to know that CRG has successfully worked with Virtual Professionals for over 6 years now. We have proven systems and models to ensure success for our VPs. We are not a company hoping to make a VP work or trying an experiment. We have a proven track record of helping our VPs become extremely successful. We are looking for long-term fits and only looking for those wanting to have CRG as their sole employer in a full-time capacity.



We will conduct reference checks, and WE WILL REQUIRE REFERENCES IN THE FORM OF A PHONE NUMBER SO THAT WE CAN SPEAK TO YOUR PRIOR EMPLOYERS. We want to ensure we are bringing on the best of the best, so we will not accept candidates only willing to provide
 addresses as a reference. WE ALSO REQUIRE A CURRENT COPY OF A VALID NBI PRIOR TO THE START DATE.



This position requires a well-organized, service-minded individual with good time-management skills and attention to detail. This person will provide administrative support to our Account Managers, which then frees them up to consistently communicate with our clients. This is a very tech-savvy position, so strong technology aptitude is a must to complete tasks. We use Sierra Interactive as our CRM and Sisu for task management.



A few of our group's most commonly used affirmations and mottos are below:

-Get comfortable being uncomfortable

-The only way to grow is to change

-Keep your emotions between the lines

-BE DO HAVE



Primary Objectives

-Maintain and manage all systems for sellers, buyers, database management, information management, and back-office support

-Manage contracts alongside the Account Manager through closing

-Manage listings alongside the Account Manager through the contract

-Keep the Agents and Account Managers informed regarding any problems or issues that need to be handled

-Assist the Director of Operations with blog writing and social media posting



Regular Work Activities

-System development, implementation, and management

-Information management

-Oversight of contracts and listings

-Regular, effective communication with Agents and Account Managers

-Coordinate various pre-listing activities for our home selling clients



Key Skills

-Transaction and Listing Coordination

-Strong written communication skills

-Exceptional organizational and project management abilities

-Great ability to focus

-Concerned about doing things the right way

-Calm under pressure

-Learning-based

-Service-based attitude

-Proven ability to succeed



Systems Used

-Docusign

-KW Command

-ZipForms

-Matrix MLS

-Gsuite

-Sierra Interactive

-Sisu

-Canva

-Mailchimp



People Contacts and Interactions

-Client Experience Managers – daily

-Lead Administrative Assistant– daily

-Agents – as appropriate



Work Schedule (5 days / week)

- M-F, 9 AM to 6 PM CST

- Rotating Sat shifts (11 AM to 4 PM CST) every three weeks with a Wed off that week (paid for a full 8-hour shift)



System Requirements

-Internet connection with at least 10mbps speed

-Reliable backup internet connection

-Reliable power backup



Learn More About Us!


/hiring

title: Real Estate Cold Caller / Inside Sales Agent (ISA)
description:
We are hiring a serious cold caller to help generate seller leads and set appointments for a real estate business based in Washington State (USA).



This is not a beginner role.



If you are not confident speaking with homeowners, handling objections, and having real conversations — this is not the right fit.



If you are experienced, confident, and know how to control a call — keep reading.



What This Role Is



• Outbound cold calling to homeowners

• Real conversations — not robotic script reading

• Identifying potential sellers

• Setting qualified appointments



You are the first point of contact — your performance directly impacts the business.



What This Role Is NOT



• Not customer support

• Not admin work

• Not data entry



This is a performance-based calling role.



What We Expect



You must:



• Have real cold calling or sales experience

• Speak clear, confident English

• Handle rejection without hesitation

• Stay on the phone and keep conversations going

• Follow a script while sounding natural

• Take clear and accurate notes



If you have never cold called before, please do not apply.



What You’ll Be Using



• CRM system – BoldTrail

• Dialer – Kixie

• Structured call lists and scripts



We provide the system — you bring the skill.



Compensation



• Competitive full-time pay

• Performance-based bonuses

• Long-term opportunity for top performers



We reward performance — not just activity.



Important – Read Carefully Before Applying



We are only moving forward with candidates who follow instructions.



To apply, you must include:



1?? A 30–60 second voice recording

? Introduce yourself and describe your cold calling experience



2?? A short summary of your sales or calling experience



3?? Your internet speed test result



4?? Use the phrase “Serious Caller” in your subject line



If you do not follow these instructions, your application will not be reviewed.



Final Note



We are looking for someone reliable, professional, and ready to work.



If you are confident on the phone and want a long-term role — we want to hear from you.

description:

CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more.

description:
About the Role



We are a Sydney-based software development agency looking for a skilled full-stack developer to take end-to-end ownership of AI-powered SaaS platforms we are building for clients. You will be working across AI projects including multi-provider orchestration pipelines, RAG-based content generation, programmatic document processing, and full multi-tenant SaaS builds. Detailed specifications are ready to go. You will be the primary developer, working directly with our technical lead and project manager.



This is a remote, exclusive role. You must be available during Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST/AEDT) business hours.



The Work



You will be building full SaaS applications from scratch using React 18, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and TypeScript. The projects are heavily AI-integrated and involve real technical complexity — this is not a CRUD app role.



AI Orchestration and Multi-Provider Pipelines

Work includes building custom orchestration layers that chain multiple AI providers in sequence (including OpenAI, Claude, and Perplexity). You will implement pipeline logic covering parallelism, retry strategies with exponential backoff, rate limit management across providers, and streaming responses via SSE.



RAG and Vector Store Architecture

Projects include work with the OpenAI Responses API, file_search, and managed vector stores to generate AI content grounded in client knowledge bases. The retrieval architecture uses a multi-store design separating shared expert knowledge from per-client and per-job data — shaped by the two-vector-store-per-call constraint on the Responses API. You will build setup scripts, sync logic, metadata filtering, and the full generation pipeline.



Document Processing and Assembly

Work includes parsing uploaded PDF and DOCX files using Azure Document Intelligence to extract questions, tables, and document structure, then mapping AI-generated content back into the original document format without breaking layout or formatting. This is among the most technically demanding work in the engagement and a key competitive differentiator for our clients.



SaaS Platform Features

Projects involve full multi-tenant SaaS applications including user authentication, subscription billing via Stripe and/or Chargebee (webhooks, billing portal, feature gating by tier), knowledge base management, file uploads, admin portals, and health check engines.



What You Will Be Doing



Building AI-powered SaaS platforms end-to-end from detailed functional and technical specifications

Implementing multi-provider AI orchestration pipelines with parallelism, retry logic, and rate limit management

Setting up and managing OpenAI vector stores: file sync scripts, metadata attributes, multi-store retrieval architecture

Solving document mapping challenges: parsing input documents with Azure Document Intelligence and assembling correctly formatted DOCX outputs from AI-generated content

Building full SaaS platform features: auth, subscription billing, multi-tenancy, feature gating, file uploads, admin workflows

Writing production-quality, well-typed TypeScript across frontend and backend

Reading and building from specification documents — raising questions where specs are ambiguous or incomplete

Participating in standups, providing regular progress updates, and communicating blockers early



Requirements



Must Have



5+ years of professional full-stack development with React and Node.js as your primary stack

Strong TypeScript across frontend and backend — comfortable with type inference, generics, and type-safe ORM usage

PostgreSQL with a modern ORM (Drizzle preferred, Prisma acceptable) — schema design, migrations, query optimisation

Solid third-party API integration experience — authentication, webhooks, error handling

OpenAI API experience, ideally the Responses API, file_search, and vector store management; if not, you must be a fast learner from documentation

Azure Document Intelligence

Experience parsing or generating documents programmatically (PDF, DOCX) — extracting structured data from unstructured sources or producing formatted output from code

Stripe integration experience — subscription billing, webhooks, billing portal

Ability to work independently from detailed specifications without needing hand-holding on every decision



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



A brief summary of your relevant experience, specifically addressing the AI and document processing requirements

A PDF or Google Doc link to your CV — applications without a CV will not be considered

Links to projects or repositories that demonstrate your full-stack work (GitHub, portfolio, or live projects)

Confirmation that you are: OK with screenshot capture software for time tracking; available during Sydney (AEST/AEDT) business hours; happy in an exclusive role with no paid or unpaid freelance work on the side; and willing to undergo a live technical assessment as part of the interview process

title: AI Animation Specialist — Image-to-Video & Lipsync
description:
Performance Marketing | Global E-Commerce Brand | Full-Time



The Role



We're hiring a full-time AI Animation Specialist to own one focused workflow: taking AI-generated images and bringing them to life as video ads — complete with lipsync and natural movement — ready for live paid campaigns.



This role is 100% Kling. No traditional video editing, no filming, no graphic design. Just deep, daily mastery of the AI pipeline that turns static images into high-converting video creatives.





The Workflow You'll Own



1. Receive AI-generated images

You'll be handed character images (full-body shots, headshots, multi-angle faces) produced by the team's AI image pipeline. Your job starts here.



2. Build the character in Kling

- Upload images from multiple angles to construct a consistent AI character

- Upload voice audio to bind voice to character

- Define character name and parameters for reuse across campaigns



3. Break the script into segments

- Divide scripts into 3–8 second parts

- Match Kling generation length to each audio segment



4. Animate and lipsync

- Generate clips using Kling Video 3.0

- Use matched start/end frames to keep the character visually consistent

- Apply clean, precise prompts to control movement and style



Example prompt: "Single continuous shot. Natural handheld iPhone style. No cuts. No zoom. Make the person speak the dialogue: [text]"



5. QC every clip before it leaves your hands

- Natural hand gestures and body movement

- Accurate lipsync and pronunciation

- Realistic camera motion — no unwanted zoom

- No glitches in face, hands, or mouth

- No background audio bleed

- Smooth transitions between segments for the editor



If it doesn't pass, you don't ship it. You regenerate and improve.





This Role Is Purely Kling



You will not be doing anything outside of Kling-based production. Every part of the workflow — animation, lipsync, character generation, voiceover sync — happens inside Kling.



We want someone who is fully immersed in this one tool and committed to mastering it completely. Your entire focus is making this pipeline faster, better, and more consistent every single day.





The Environment



You'll work inside a dedicated AI content team alongside 8+ creatives and a broader marketing department of 17+. The team ships and tests daily. Feedback loops are short. Iteration is constant.



Honest expectations: This role requires 60 to 70 hours per week with regular availability 7 days a week. Only apply if you're genuinely ready for that output level.





Who We're Looking For



Experience with Kling or AI tools is a plus but not required. What matters far more is who you are as a person and how you work.



- Extremely proactive — you don't wait to be told, you figure it out and get it done

- Hard working — you take pride in volume and quality, not one or the other

- Highly available — you're online, responsive, and showing up consistently

- Detail-obsessed — you notice when something looks off and you fix it without being asked

- Fast learner — you pick up new tools and workflows quickly and improve with every iteration

- Fully committed — this is not a side job, it's your main focus and you treat it that way



We're not looking for someone with all the answers. We're looking for someone hungry, coachable, and ready to put in the work.





What You'll Gain



- Deep, marketable expertise in AI image-to-video production — one of the most in-demand skills emerging right now

- Direct exposure to performance marketing at scale — real campaigns, real data, real feedback

- A proven track record inside a global e-commerce brand that very few people in this space can match yet



There's real room to grow here for people who prove themselves.





How to Apply



Apply directly through OnlineJobs and send us a message introducing yourself.



If you have a portfolio or any examples of AI animation, lipsync, or image-to-video work — polished or experimental — please include a link or attach them to your message. It's not required, but it will significantly strengthen your application.

title: Web Developer (Experience with Railway, Supabase, Vercel)
description:
We are looking for a skilled and reliable Web Developer to join our growing company. The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with modern deployment platforms and backend tools, along with a strong understanding of web security best practices.



You will be responsible for building, deploying, and maintaining web applications while ensuring performance, scalability, and security.



Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain responsive web applications

Deploy and manage applications using Railway and/or Vercel

Work with Supabase for backend services (database, authentication, APIs)

Optimize applications for speed and scalability

Implement cybersecurity best practices to protect applications and data

Troubleshoot and debug issues across the stack

Collaborate with the team on new features and improvements



Requirements:

Proven experience as a Web Developer

Experience with Railway, Supabase, and/or Vercel

Strong knowledge of JavaScript frameworks (React, Next.js, or similar)

Familiarity with REST APIs and database management

Understanding of cybersecurity principles (e.g., data protection, authentication, secure coding)

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely

title: Virtual Assistant Bookkeeper (Long-Term | Stable Role)
description:
Virtual Assistant Bookkeeper (Long-Term | Stable Role)

Company: 19K Design and Contracting (Canada)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Part-Time or Full-Time (Flexible, PST overlap required)

Rate: Based on experience (paid weekly/bi-weekly)



About Us



We are a growing construction and renovation company based in Canada. We focus on high-quality work, honesty, and long-term relationships—with both our clients and our team.



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented bookkeeper who wants a stable, long-term role with clear systems and expectations.



What You’ll Be Doing



Daily Tasks



Enter supplier invoices into QuickBooks

Upload and organize receipts

Keep financial records clean and up to date



Weekly Tasks



Verify timesheets for payroll

Track expenses and assign them to the correct projects

Monitor unpaid invoices and flag overdue payments



Monthly Tasks



Reconcile bank and credit card accounts

Ensure all transactions are accurate and complete



Ongoing



Maintain organized digital records

Assist with reports for management

Keep all financial information strictly confidential

Requirements

Strong experience with QuickBooks Online

Bookkeeping experience (construction experience is a big plus)

Understanding of payroll basics

High attention to detail (very important)

Reliable internet and ability to meet deadlines

Good written English communication

What We’re Looking For

Someone who is accurate and organized

Someone who takes initiative and solves problems

Someone who can work independently without constant supervision

Someone who wants a long-term position, not short-term work

Important Performance Expectations

Invoices entered within 24 hours

Payroll support completed on time each week

Monthly reconciliations completed on schedule

100?curacy in job costing and records

Strict confidentiality at all times

Why Work With Us

Long-term, stable work

Clear systems and expectations

Respectful and professional team

Opportunity to grow into a larger role over time

How to Apply



Please include:



Your experience with QuickBooks Online

Any experience with construction bookkeeping (if applicable)

Your internet speed

Your availability (hours per week and preferred schedule)



Important: Start your application with the word “Accurate” so we know you read everything.



We are looking for someone dependable who takes pride in clean, accurate financial work and wants to grow with a solid company.

title: Shopify Developer
description:
We’re building more than just a Shopify store—we’re creating a high-performing, branded customer experience that evolves with our business. We’re looking for a Shopify developer who wants to be part of that journey. This is not a task-based role. This is an opportunity to help shape how customers experience our brand—through design, performance, and thoughtful execution.



What You’ll Help Us Build



A seamless, intuitive user experience that drives conversion and engagement

A clean, scalable Shopify architecture as we migrate from a legacy setup to a modern theme

Modular, flexible features using theme app extensions and best practices

A faster, more responsive storefront (targeting 20% performance improvement)



How You’ll Work



Collaborate closely with us to translate ideas into real improvements

Contribute your own insights into UX, branding, and customer behavior

Help us move from a partially messy system to a clean, high-performing foundation

Balance speed and craftsmanship depending on what matters most



Who You Are



A strong Shopify developer who also cares deeply about the end user

A clear communicator who works well in a remote, async environment

Someone who takes ownership and figures things out

Detail-oriented and thoughtful in your approach

Excited to grow with a brand and make a long-term impact



Technical Requirements



3+ years Shopify experience

Strong with Liquid, Shopify CLI, and modern workflows

Experience with APIs, apps, and performance optimization

Solid frontend skills (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)



To apply, please fill out this form:

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Funnel & Automation Builder – Project-Based (Full-Time Opportunity)
description:
Job Title



GoHighLevel (GHL) Funnel & Automation Builder – Project-Based (Full-Time Opportunity)





=====

Job Description

=====



We’re not building basic funnels.



We’re building high-performance marketing systems for local businesses — designed to generate leads, bookings, and real growth.



I’m the founder of a system called Local Craze, and I’m looking for someone who can help bring these systems to life inside GoHighLevel.



I handle strategy, offers, and the big picture…



I need someone who can build alongside me and execute at a high level.



=====

What You’ll Be Doing

=====



 • Build funnels, websites, and landing pages in GoHighLevel

 • Create workflows and automations (SMS,
, triggers)

 • Set up pipelines, opportunities, and CRM systems

 • Build and configure booking calendars

 • Implement AI tools inside GHL

 • Help build industry-specific snapshots

 • Customize systems for new clients

 • Assist with maintaining and troubleshooting client accounts



=====

How We Work

=====



This is NOT a passive task-based role.



We work 1-on-1 together in real time to build high-end solutions.

 • You must be available during working sessions

 • We collaborate live to ensure quality and speed

 • The goal is to build systems that actually perform for clients



=====

Current Project (Starts Immediately)

=====



 • Project Type: Snapshot Build (Jiu-Jitsu Studio System)

 • Estimated Time: ~40 hours

 • Schedule Requirement:

 • Monday – Friday

 • 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (California Time / PST)

 • Must be fully available during these hours



=====

Pay

=====



 • $8/hour (starting)

 • Paid per project

 • Opportunity for raises and full-time role based on performance



This will start as project-by-project

Goal is to bring the right person on full-time within 1–2 months



=====

Who This Is For

=====



You’re NOT just a VA.



You’re someone who:

 • Understands GoHighLevel (or learns very fast)

 • Can follow structure but also think independently

 • Pays attention to detail

 • Wants to grow into a long-term role

 • Is reliable and shows up consistently



=====

Not a Fit If

=====



 • You are not available during the required time window

 • You need constant step-by-step instructions

 • You are juggling too many jobs

 • You don’t have experience inside GHL



=====

Tracking

=====



All work is tracked using OnlineJobs.ph TimeProof



=====

How To Apply

=====



Reply to this post with:

 1. Your experience with GoHighLevel

 2. Examples of funnels/workflows you’ve built

 3. Confirmation you are available Mon–Fri, 9 AM – 5 PM PST

 4. Why you’d be a good fit

 5. Start your application with the word “Craze Maker”



Qualified applicants will be invited to a Zoom interview.

title: Shopify Developer
description:
We’re not looking for a basic Shopify developer. We’re looking for someone who can own and improve the customer experience on our Shopify store—while helping us migrate and clean up a complex, evolving codebase.If you only install apps or follow instructions, this role is not for you.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Driving meaningful UX improvements across the storefront (not just “making things look better”)

Helping migrate from a legacy theme to a clean, scalable new theme (Dwell)

Refactoring and converting existing features into theme app extensions / modular components

Improving site performance (target: +20% speed improvement)

Working inside a partially messy, partially modern codebase and helping bring structure to it

Collaborating with us to refine ideas, challenge assumptions, and improve execution



What We Expect From You



You use Shopify CLI and modern development workflows (non-negotiable)

You communicate clearly and proactively (especially async)

You don’t get stuck—you research, troubleshoot, and unblock yourself

You ask questions early instead of guessing late

You care about UX, branding, and conversion, not just code

You can balance speed and quality depending on the importance of the task



You’ll Thrive Here If You:



Think like a partner, not just a developer

Are highly detail-oriented

Can manage your own work without constant direction

Enjoy cleaning up systems while building new features

Want to grow with a brand (not juggle 10 clients)



Requirements



3+ years Shopify development experience

Strong Liquid, HTML, CSS, JavaScript skills

Experience with Shopify APIs, apps, and integrations

Proven ability to improve UX and site performance

Experience working in evolving or legacy Shopify environments



Please fill out this form to apply:

title: Customer Service Representative (AMS 360)
description:
We're looking for a Customer Service Representative with hands-on experience in AMS 360 to support an insurance-focused client operation. This is a client-facing role where accuracy, responsiveness, and system fluency matter. You will handle inbound customer inquiries, manage policy-related requests, and navigate AMS 360 to keep records accurate and service moving without delays.



If you have worked in an insurance agency environment, know your way around AMS 360, and take pride in delivering clear and professional customer support, this role is a strong fit.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Paid Time Off in accordance with company policy

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Stable, client-facing role with clear ownership over customer interactions

- Direct impact on client satisfaction and retention



What You'll Work On



Customer Support and Communication



- Handle inbound customer inquiries via phone,
, or chat professionally and promptly

- Resolve customer issues, answer policy-related questions, and escalate complex cases as needed

- Follow up on open items and ensure every customer interaction is closed properly

- Maintain a professional, clear, and empathetic communication style across all channels



AMS 360 System Management



- Navigate AMS 360 to access, update, and manage customer and policy records accurately

- Process policy changes, endorsements, renewals, and cancellations within the system

- Ensure data integrity across all records and flag discrepancies for review

- Generate reports and pull information from AMS 360 to support internal and client needs



Administrative and Operations Support



- Maintain organized records and documentation for all customer interactions

- Support internal teams with data entry, record updates, and workflow coordination

- Identify recurring customer issues and surface them to the team for process improvement



What You Bring



- Proven experience working with AMS 360 in a professional capacity

- Background in insurance agency operations, customer service, or a related field

- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English

- High attention to detail and accuracy in data entry and record management

- Organized, self-sufficient, and comfortable managing multiple open cases simultaneously

- Comfortable working fully remotely with minimal oversight



Nice to Have



- Experience in a licensed insurance agency or brokerage environment

- Familiarity with insurance policy types including personal lines, commercial lines, or benefits

- Experience with other agency management systems alongside AMS 360



How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your updated resume

2. A short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes) introducing yourself, describing your experience with AMS 360, and walking through how you handle a high-volume or complex customer service situation



Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.



If you know AMS 360, communicate clearly under pressure, and want a stable client-facing role where your attention to detail directly drives customer satisfaction, this role gives you the ownership and the consistency to do your best work.

title: Customer Service Representative (Luxury and Fashion)
description:
We're looking for a Customer Service Representative with experience supporting high-end luxury or fashion brands to deliver a premium client experience. This is not a standard support role. The clients you serve expect a level of care, polish, and responsiveness that matches the brand they have chosen to engage with. Every interaction reflects the standard of the brand itself.



You will handle customer inquiries, resolve issues, and manage the full customer journey with the discretion, warmth, and professionalism that luxury clientele expect. If you have worked in a high-end retail, fashion, or luxury brand environment and understand what white-glove service actually looks like in practice, this role is a strong fit.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Paid Time Off in accordance with company policy

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Client-facing role inside a premium brand environment where your communication sets the tone

- Opportunity to build long-term relationships with high-value customers



 What You'll Work On



Premium Customer Support



- Handle inbound inquiries from luxury brand customers via
, chat, or phone with professionalism and warmth

- Resolve order issues, returns, exchanges, and complaints in a way that protects the customer relationship and reflects brand standards

- Anticipate customer needs and go beyond transactional responses to deliver a genuinely premium experience

- Manage escalations with composure and escalate internally when situations require senior involvement



Order and Account Management



- Track and manage customer orders, shipping updates, and delivery inquiries accurately

- Coordinate with internal teams and third-party partners to resolve fulfillment or product issues

- Maintain accurate customer records and interaction histories

- Follow up proactively on open cases without waiting to be asked



Brand Representation



- Uphold brand voice, tone, and communication standards in every customer interaction

- Adapt communication style to match the expectations of high-net-worth or brand-loyal clientele

- Represent the brand with discretion, attention to detail, and genuine care for the customer experience



 What You Bring



- Experience in customer service for a luxury brand, fashion label, or premium retail environment

- Polished written and verbal communication skills in English with a strong command of tone and professionalism

- Ability to handle sensitive customer situations with composure and discretion

- Organized, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple open cases without dropping details

Nice to Have

- Experience working with international or high-net-worth clientele

- Multilingual ability, particularly in French, Italian, or Spanish



How to Apply

If you understand what luxury service actually means, communicate with polish and precision, and want to represent a premium brand where every interaction matters, this role gives you the platform and the ownership to deliver it at the highest level.

title: Executive Assistant (Manufacturing Operations)
description:
We're looking for an **Executive Assistant** to support the founder of a privately held manufacturing business. The work is straightforward: phones, calendar, scheduling, and day-to-day administrative tasks handled reliably and without needing to be chased.



The business is stable, focused, and not trying to be something it is not. If you are looking for a straightforward role where your job is to keep things organized and the founder's time protected, this is a strong fit.



Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Up to 14 days of Paid Time Off annually (starting Day 1)

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Direct working relationship with the founder from day one

- Stable, long-term role with room to grow as trust is established



What You'll Work On



Phone and Communication Management



- Answer and manage inbound calls on behalf of the founder

- Screen, triage, and route calls and messages appropriately

- Draft and send routine correspondence as directed

- Follow up on open items and ensure nothing falls through the cracks



Calendar and Schedule Management



- Own the founder's calendar and keep it clean, accurate, and current

- Schedule and confir
etings, calls, and appointments

- Coordinate with external contacts to align availability

- Anticipate scheduling conflicts and resolve them proactively



Administrative Support



- Handle day-to-day administrative tasks including data entry, document management, and file organization

- Manage basic record keeping and maintain organized systems for contacts, documents, and recurring tasks

- Support ad hoc requests as they arise and close loops without being reminded

- Help build simple processes and routines that make operations run more smoothly over time



What You Bring



- Prior experience in an executive assistant, administrative assistant, or similar support role

- Reliable phone presence and strong verbal communication skills

- Excellent written communication with attention to detail

- High organizational skills and comfort managing a busy calendar

- Self-directed and proactive: you spot what needs handling and you handle it

- Trustworthy, discreet, and consistent in how you show up every day

- Comfortable working independently in a remote setup without daily check-ins



Nice to Have



- Experience supporting a founder, owner, or solo executive directly

- Background in manufacturing, trades, or operational businesses

- Familiarity with basic bookkeeping or vendor coordination



How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your updated resume

2. A short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes) introducing yourself and describing how you have managed a busy calendar or kept a demanding executive organized in a previous role



Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.



If you are dependable, organized, and take pride in making someone else's day run smoothly, this role gives you a direct line to the founder and the chance to build something from the ground up.
