title: Performance-Driven AI Video Editor for Meta Ads (Direct-Response Only)
description:
We’re hiring a high-level video editor who specializes in direct-response Meta ads for
 & Instagram.



This is not a generic content editing role.

We’re looking for an editor who understands why ads convert, can build AI UGC at scale, and knows how to turn both real footage and AI avatars into sales-driven Meta ads.



If you can create scroll-stopping AI and UGC ads that perform, this is a long-term role with fast income growth tied to results.



What You’ll Be Doing



• Edit high-converting short-for ---------- ta ads (15–60s)

• Create AI-generated video ads using HeyGen, Arcads, or similar platforms

• Build AI UGC-style ads that feel native, human, and authentic

• Craft hooks in the first 1–3 seconds optimized for Meta scroll behavior

• Structure ads using direct-response frameworks (hook ? problem ? mechanism ? proof ? CTA)

• Add captions, motion graphics, pacing, sound design, and effects that increase retention

• Optimize creatives for Feeds, Reels, and Stories

• Work with the marketing team to test, iterate, and scale winning AI + UGC creatives



What We’re Looking For (Non-Negotiable)



•Proven experience editing direct-response Meta ads that convert

• Hands-on experience creating AI video ads using HeyGen, Arcads, or similar tools

• Strong understanding of AI UGC best practices (believability, cadence, avatar selection, voice realism)

• Deep knowledge of Meta ad psychology (thumb-stop rate, retention curves, CTA timing)

• Strong storytelling, pacing, and persuasion skills

• Ability to turn raw footage OR AI-generated clips into high-performing ads

• Proficiency in Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or similar tools

• Understanding of Meta compliance basics for health & supplement ads

• Fluent in English with strong understanding of U.S., UK, and Canadian markets



Bonus (Not Required):

• Experience editing ads in supplements, health, or wellness

• Familiarity with UGC-style ads and performance captions



Long-Term Opportunity & Fast Income Growth



This is a long-term role, not a one-off contract.



You’ll start with base pay per video, and as your ads perform:

• Your rate increases

• You earn performance bonuses

• You get priority access to higher-budget campaigns



The better your ads perform, the faster you earn more.



Application Requirements (Important)



To apply, submit ALL of the following:



1 A short Loom video introducing yourself

– Your experience with Meta ads

– What makes ads convert (in your words)



2 A portfolio of direct-response video ads

– Paid social ads ONLY (no cinematic montages or YouTube edits)

– Highlight any performance results if available



3 Examples of AI-generated ads you’ve created

– Specify which tools were used (HeyGen, Arcads, etc.)



4 References from the last 3 brands you worked with

– Include examples of your best-performing ads



Include "AI AD WINNING EDITOR" in your subject line. Applications without direct-response ad examples will not be reviewed.



What We Offer



• Base pay + performance bonuses

• Long-term, consistent work

• Opportunity to scale income quickly

• Work with a fast-scaling supplement brand focused on performance, not fluff



TYPE OF WORK

Full Time





WAGE / SALARY

1200





HOURS PER WEEK

40

title: Remote Paralegal / Legal Assistant for US Business Law Firm
description:
Part-Time Legal Assistant / Paralegal

Lakhani Legal PLLC · Remote · Part-time ·



Lakhani Legal is a boutique business and IP law firm helping small and mid-sized businesses protect their brands, close deals, and build lasting companies. We're a small, tight-knit team that moves fast, cares deeply about quality, and genuinely enjoys the work. We're looking for a right-hand person who feels the same way.



What you'll do



This is a broad, varied role. You'll touch almost every part of the practice.



Trademark and IP support



Manage trademark dockets, including USPTO deadlines, response windows, and maintenance dates

Prepare shell USPTO response briefs and format filings for attorney review

Handle TEAS filings once substantive work is complete

Pull TMEP sections, comparable prosecution histories, and basic research to support attorney analysis



Client experience



Run client onboarding and offboarding, including intake docs, engagement letters, matter setup, and file closing

Draft and send routine client status updates, deadline reminders, and follow-up communications

Triage and organize
 and draft routine responses for attorney review



Drafting and proofreading



Proofread legal documents, filing documents, and standard correspondence

Maintain and version-control the firm's template library (NDAs, engagement letters, standard agreements)



Operations and admin



Own project and matter management and keep workflows moving without being asked

Maintain CRM and matter management systems (Airtable) and keep records current

Handle invoice follow-ups and routine billing admin

Occasional travel booking and calendar coordination



Marketing support



Post LinkedIn posts drafted by attorney 

Help create visual assets for posts 

Format and distribute newsletters and client-facing one-pagers

Help maintain a basic content calendar



Who you are

Detail-oriented to the point of noticing things others miss and fixing them without being asked

Action-oriented and self-directed; you identify what needs to happen and do it

Tech-savvy and actively use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) to work smarter

A clear, professional writer who can draft client
s that sound polished and on-brand

Discreet, reliable, and someone who treats every client matter with care



What you bring

2+ years of experience supporting an attorney (business, corporate, or IP law preferred)

Familiarity with USPTO processes and trademark docketing is a strong plus

Proficiency with Airtable (or similar practice/project management tools) and LawPay

Comfortable with Google Workspace 

Strong written English, legal drafting experience is a bonus



The details



Part-time, fully remote contractor role. Flexible hours with availability expected during core Eastern business hours. Compensation is $8-10/hr depending on experience.



To apply, send a brief note about your background and why this role interests you, along with your resume, to [your
]. Applications without a cover note won't be reviewed.

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based, Process-Driven)



Job Overview



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: Project Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a Project Manager to oversee the day-to-day delivery of automation projects for our MSP (Managed Service Provider) clients. You'll make sure our engineers are always working on the right tasks, clients are kept updated, and nothing falls through the cracks.

This is a high-ownership role. You sit between our engineering team and our clients — assigning work, clearing blockers, tracking progress, and sending clear status updates to each MSP client.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Engineer & Team Management

-Assign tasks to engineers based on availability and client priority

-Monitor daily activity to make sure all engineers are actively working — no one is idle

-Identify and remove blockers preventing engineers from moving forward

-Track workload per engineer and flag issues before they affect delivery

-Run regular check-ins to review task status, deadlines, and progress



Client Management & Communication

-Manage the relationship between our team and our MSP clients

-Proactively update clients on task progress, milestones, and delays — before they ask

-Communicate updates in a clear, easy-to-understand way for clients

-Keep detailed workflow notes so every client briefing is ready and accurate



Project & Task Oversight

-Maintain the master task tracker — every task needs an engineer, due date, priority, and updated status

-Prioritize requests based on SLA agreements and business impact

-Conduct weekly reviews of all open, blocked, and at-risk tasks

-Escalate high-priority issues to leadership when needed



Documentation

-Log workflow updates for team visibility and client reference

-Keep client profiles up to date: contacts, SLA terms, contract types, and assigned engineers

-Spot recurring issues and recommend process improvements





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required:

-Experience in project management, operations, or a client-facing coordination role

-Experience managing or coordinating teams

-Strong organizational skills — you can juggle multiple clients and projects at once

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills

-Comfortable with task tracking tools (spreadsheets, project management platforms)

-A proactive attitude — you keep things moving and stay on top of everything



How to Apply:

Send your application to 
 including your expected salary.

title: B2B Appointment Setter – AI Solution (US Market)
description:
About Us



We are Valemont Partners, a company selling a 24/7 AI receptionist solution in the United States.



Our AI system:

 • Answers inbound calls 24/7

 • Handles customer inquiries

 • Follows up with leads automatically

 • Books appointments directly into clients’ calendars



We help call-heavy businesses stop missing revenue opportunities.



Who We’re Looking For

We are hiring a serious, performance-driven B2B appointment setter to book qualified discovery calls with autorepair companies in the US, more specifically Texas and Florida. You have the freedom to use your own leads in order to indentify decision-makers. However, we can also provide a lead list. The channel used will be phone calls. 



You will be responsible for:

 • Booking qualified discovery calls

 • Ensuring strong show-up rates



Booking calls alone is not enough. We prioritize:

 • Decision-makers only

 • Strong ICP fit

 • High show-up rates (60% or more)



You must implement proper follow-up systems (reminders, confirmations, reschedules if needed) to ensure prospects attend the call. Quality and attendance matter more than raw volume.:





Structure & Compensation

We are open to both part-time and full-time roles, depending on performance and alignment. Before moving into a longer-term agreement, we will run a 2-week paid trial period. This trial is not unpaid. It is a compensated test week, based on the rate and structure we agree on beforehand. The purpose of the trial is to evaluate:

 • Lead quality

 • Booking volume

 • Show-up rate

 • Communication and follow-up process

 • Overall fit and professionalism



If performance meets expectations, we will move forward into a longer-term part-time or full-time arrangement. Compensation structure will be discussed individually with shortlisted candidates based on experience, availability, and performance expectations..



To Apply, Please Answer the Following:

 1. If we ran a 2-week paid trial, how many qualified discovery calls can you realistically book?

 2. Out of those, how many do you expect would show up?

 3. Would you use your own leads or do you need us to provide you with leads?

 4. Do you already have a US phone number? Do you have your own dialer/hosting setup? Is your internet stable?

 5. Please send a short 2–3 minute audio explaining your background, your results or how you would approach this project specifically.

title: Humbly Confident Video Editor
description:
WHO WE ARE



We're a small, fast-growing web design agency that works primarily with coaches and expertise-based businesses. We help them grow their businesses through beautiful, strategic web design and marketing.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We're looking for a skilled Video Editor to join our team and own the editing of our agency's YouTube channel and short-form social content. This content is how we market ourselves and attract new clients, so your work will directly help us grow.



Currently, the owner (that's me, Jennie) films talking-head educational videos and tutorials for service businesses, expertise-based businesses, and online businesses (think coaches, consultants, and more). I handle the filming, scripting, and rough cuts. That means I remove the bad takes and mark up the script with notes on where I think B-roll, graphics, or visual interest should go.



What I need from you is the creative expertise to take that foundation and make it *good*. You'll bring the pacing, transitions, motion graphics, text overlays, sound design, and visual storytelling that turn an educational talking-head video into something people actually want to watch.



This role is primarily focused on long-form YouTube content, with additional light editing on short-form clips (Reels, Shorts, etc.) for our social channels. We'd like to get to 2–3 long-form videos a month and work our way toward weekly long-form over time. I need someone who can grow with us.



You'll report directly to me and collaborate with our team as needed. We'll connect via Zoom as needed, and you're welcome to work normal hours in your time zone.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Your job will be to use your past experience to:



- Edit 2–3 long-form YouTube videos per month from pre-cut raw footage and a marked-up script, working our way toward weekly long-form over time

- Edit approximately 3–5 short-form video clips per week (Reels, Shorts). These are light edits, mostly clipping b-roll I record for funny reels and adding text to them

- Add motion graphics, text overlays, transitions, B-roll suggestions, and sound design that make educational content visually engaging

- Bring your own creative perspective. I'll give you editorial notes, but I'm not a video editor, so I really appreciate you bringing your creative eye on what will keep viewers watching

- Maintain meticulous quality control. That means catching audio issues, awkward cuts, mismatched graphics, typos in text overlays, and anything that doesn't feel polished

- Deliver final files on schedule so our publishing workflow stays on track

- Occasionally support a small number of client video projects with similar editing work

- Optional: Create thumbnails for YouTube videos. A great plus, but not required!



EXPERIENCE



We care more about a high skill level than years of experience, but we expect that you have at least 2 years of experience editing video content, ideally for YouTube or other social platforms.



You're proficient with professional editing software. We prefer tools like Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro, but we're open to your preferred tool as long as the output is professional quality.



You have a strong eye for pacing and visual storytelling in educational, talking-head content. You know how to keep a viewer engaged through smart cuts, well-timed graphics, and visual variety, even when the core content is someone talking to a camera.



You can work with motion graphics and text overlays confidently. Meaning you should be comfortable creating clean lower thirds and simple graphic elements that make the content easier to follow.



You have meticulous QA habits. You catch audio sync issues, color inconsistencies, typos in on-screen text and awkward transitions before anything is delivered.



Oh, and you get a little thrill when the video you edited becomes an outlier video for the channel!



You're not shy about being (humbly) confident enough to push back and share your creative opinion. If you think a cut isn't working, a graphic would help, or the pacing needs to change, I want to hear it. We encourage that.



You're comfortable collaborating using Google Drive and Zoom, and optionally Notion for our content calendar.



HOW WE WILL HELP YOU SUCCEED



We want you to succeed in this role. We will provide any additional training you may need to get on board and hit the ground running. We're not going to teach you how to edit video because your past experience will serve you well.



However, we will train you regarding our brand, our audience, our content style, and our workflow so you can apply your skills to help us achieve our mission. We will listen to you encourage you to bring your entire self to work. We are humans first, work colleagues second.



EMPLOYMENT TYPE



This is a flexible role based on the time it takes to deliver the expected output (2–3 long-form videos per month + 3–5 short-form clips per week). That may be full-time for you, or it may not. We're open to discussing what works. We're not looking for an agency. 



Please begin your cover letter with the title of one of the videos on our YouTube channel at

title: Revenue Operations & Compliance Manager (HR & Credentialing Focus)
description:
Revenue Operations & Compliance Manager (HR & Credentialing Focus)



Location: Remote

Reports To: CEO



Overview



We are seeking a highly experienced Revenue Operations & Compliance Manager with a strong background in HR operations and clinician credentialing within healthcare staffing.



This is not an administrative role — it is a hands-on leadership position responsible for ensuring full compliance, seamless credentialing, and efficient HR operations that directly impact revenue, placements, and client satisfaction.



You will play a critical role in maintaining Joint Commission readiness, optimizing onboarding workflows, and ensuring clinicians are fully qualified, compliant, and deployment-ready without delays.



Key Responsibilities

Credentialing & Compliance (Primary Focus)

Own and manage end-to-end clinician credentialing and onboarding processes

Ensure full compliance with Joint Commission standards and maintain audit readiness at all times

Verify licenses, certifications, background checks, and documentation accuracy

Build and optimize credentialing systems, trackers, and SOPs to eliminate delays

Proactively identify and resolve compliance gaps before they impact placements





HR Operations & Clinician Management

Lead HR operations, including onboarding, documentation, and policy enforcement

Manage clinician relations, engagement, and retention strategies

Ensure all employees meet compliance, credentialing, and employment requirements

Partner with leadership to improve workforce stability and performance





Revenue Operations & Financial Coordination

Oversee payroll coordination, invoicing, and accounts receivable (AR)

Track and protect profit margins across placements

Ensure operational workflows support timely billing and revenue capture





Account & Operations Management

Manage and protect facility accounts and relationships

Ensure clinicians are deployed on time and fully compliant

Identify opportunities to improve operational efficiency and support growth





Qualifications (Strong Emphasis)

Proven experience in healthcare staffing, HR, and credentialing (REQUIRED)

Deep understanding of Joint Commission standards, audits, and compliance workflows

Strong background as a clinician in onboarding, license verification, and documentation management

Experience managing HR operations and employee lifecycle in a staffing environment

Familiarity with payroll, invoicing, and AR processes

Highly systems-oriented, detail-driven, and process-focused

Strong leadership mindset with the ability to own outcomes and drive improvements





What Success Looks Like

100% audit-ready credentialing and compliance systems

Zero placement delays due to missing or incomplete credentials

Smooth, efficient HR onboarding and clinician management processes

Strong clinician retention and high facility satisfaction

Healthy margins with accurate, timely billing and AR control





Position Summary

This role is ideal for someone who thrives in high-accountability environments, understands that credentialing and HR are the backbone of revenue, and can build systems that ensure every placement is compliant, timely, and profitable.

title: AI Video Content Creator
description:
We're looking for someone to generate AI-powered video and image content for Instagram models on an ongoing basis. You'll be given reference videos (from Instagram, TikTok, etc.) and your job is to face-swap our model into those videos using Higgsfield and 
(
). The final output needs to look as realistic as possible — if it looks AI, it's unusable. You'll be extracting first frames, generating face-swapped frames with correct proportions (head size, body, skin tone), and then running the full video generation workflow. Quality control is critical: every frame you produce has to pass a side-by-side comparison with the original and look like a real person, not an AI render.



This is a flexible, remote role. Active work is roughly 1–2 hours per session to set up and queue videos, then you wait for them to generate. You should be comfortable working independently, using your own judgment on what looks good vs. bad, and communicating async via
. Experience with AI image generation tools (Higgsfield, ComfyUI, Stable Diffusion, etc.) is a strong plus but not required — we have a full SOP that walks you through every step. What matters most is attention to detail, a good eye for what looks real, and the ability to follow instructions precisely.

title: Creative Stratagist
description:
JOB TITLE: Creative Strategist — Direct Response Supplement Brand (Remote, Full-Time)



COMPANY: Fast-growing American supplement brand doing $600K+ MRR and scaling to $1.5M/month. We sell wild American bison organ supplements direct-to-consumer through Meta Ads and Shopify. 100% subscription model. We spend $15K+/day on Meta and are scaling aggressively.



WHO WE ARE:

We're not a generic supplement brand. We sell a premium product with a unique mechanism, a loyal customer base of 50,000+ men, and proven ad creative DNA that prints. Our ads are raw, direct, comparison-driven, and built on deep avatar psychology. We need someone who can take what's already working and multiply it — not someone who wants to start from scratch with "brand awareness" ideas.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:



You will own the entire creative pipeline from concept to launch. Specifically:



- Develop
new ad creatives per week across static images, video scripts, and ad copy

- Analyze winning creative DNA and build systematic variations that maintain the winning mechanism while refreshing the visual wrapper

- Write direct response ad copy for Meta 
/Instagram) that stops the scroll, validates the avatar's failed journey, and creates an open loop that drives clicks

- Brief a video editor on scripts — you write the scripts with scene directions, talent notes, props, and pacing cues. The editor produces them.

- Brief an AI image designer on static prompts — you write detailed visual prompts for AI image generation tools. The designer generates them.

- Manage the creative testing process — launch new CBOs, monitor performance, kill losers fast, scale winners, and feed learnings back into the next batch

- Study competitors weekly — analyze what's working in the organ supplement space and adjacent men's health brands, then adapt winning angles for our brand

- Track CPA, ROAS, CTR, CPC, and CVR by creative and identify patterns in what's working and what's not

- Collaborate directly with the CEO on strategy, angles, and scaling decisions



WHAT YOU MUST HAVE (NON-NEGOTIABLE):



1. Direct experience as a creative strategist for a supplement brand or health/wellness DTC brand. Not e-commerce in general. Supplements specifically. You understand compliance, health claims, mechanism-based selling, and solution-aware audiences.



2. A portfolio showing ads YOU created or strategized that generated measurable results. Screenshots of ads, performance data, ROAS numbers, spend levels. If you can't show your work, we can't hire you.



3. Experience on a brand that has done at least $3M+ in annual revenue through paid social. We're past the startup phase. We need someone who has operated at scale and understands what it takes to manage $10-20K/day in ad spend without burning money.



4. Deep understanding of direct response copywriting. You know the difference between TOFU and BOFU. You understand System 1 vs System 2 thinking. You know how to validate a failed journey, reframe a root cause, and create tribal hierarchy in a static image. If these terms mean nothing to you, this isn't the role.



5. Proficiency with Meta Ads Manager. You can launch CBOs, read data, manage budgets, and make kill/scale decisions independently.



6. Experience writing video scripts for talking head and UGC-style ads. Our videos follow a 7-part framework: Hook, Story, Problem, Discovery, Solution, Results, CTA. You need to be able to write scripts that an actor can film from with minimal direction.



7. Experience creating or briefing static ad creatives. You don't need to be a designer. But you need to be able to write a detailed visual prompt or creative brief that a designer or AI tool can execute from.



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED BUT PREFERRED):



- Experience with AI image generation tools (Midjourney, Nano Banana, DALL-E, etc.)

- Experience with competitor research tools (Meta Ad Library, Atria, Foreplay, etc.)

- Experience with subscription-based DTC brands (recurring revenue models)

- Familiarity with the ancestral health / organ supplement / men's testosterone space

- Experience with advertorial funnels and listicle landing pages



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN THIS ROLE:



Month 1: You've audited all current winning creatives, identified the winning DNA patterns, and produced your first batch of 50+ new creatives (statics + scripts + copy). At least 3-5 new winners emerge from your first month's output.



Month 3: Creative hit rate has improved from 5-10% to 15-20%. CPC has dropped meaningfully. You're producing 100+ creatives per week and the testing pipeline is systematized. New winning angles are being discovered monthly.



Month 6: You've contributed directly to scaling the brand from $600K MRR to $1M+ MRR through creative output. You have a library of 20+ proven winning creatives that you've built or iterated on. The creative process runs like a machine.



COMPENSATION:



Base: $2,000 USD/month (flat, paid monthly)

Bonus: 1% of total ad spend on any creative you produced that becomes a "winner" (defined as a creative that spends $5,000+ at or above target ROAS within 30 days of launch)



Example: If you create a static that spends $20,000 in a month at target ROAS, you earn $200 bonus on top of your base. If you produce 5 winners that collectively spend $100,000, that's $1,000 bonus. At scale ($450K/month ad spend), if your creatives account for even 30% of total spend, that's $1,350/month in bonuses on top of your $2,000 base = $3,350/month.



The better your creatives perform, the more you earn. This is a performance-driven role and the comp reflects that.



SCHEDULE AND LOGISTICS:



- Remote position. Work from anywhere.

- Must be available during US business hours (EST) for daily communication

- Communication via Slack or WhatsApp — daily check-ins with the CEO

- Weekly creative review calls

- Must have reliable internet and a laptop/computer capable of running Meta Ads Manager and creative tools



HOW TO APPLY:



Send the following:



1. A brief introduction about yourself — who you are, where you're based, and why you want this role.



2. Your portfolio — show me 5-10 ads (statics and/or videos) that you created or strategized for a supplement or health brand. Include performance data if possible (spend, CPA, ROAS, CTR). Screenshots fro
ta Ads Manager are ideal.



3. The name of the supplement brand(s) you've worked with and the revenue level you helped them reach.



4. A short Loom video (2-3 minutes max) analyzing one of OUR current ads. Go to our
 page, pick any ad from our library, and tell me what's working, what's not, and what you'd change. This tells me more about your thinking than any resume ever could.



5. Your expected start date and confirmation that you can work US EST hours.



Do NOT send a generic resume with no portfolio. Do NOT apply if you've never worked on a supplement brand. Do NOT apply if you can't show measurable results from your creative work.



We're building a multimillion dollar brand and we need a creative strategist who can be the engine behind it. If that's you, show me.

title: CRO / Growth Specialist – Landing Pages + Paid Traffic (A/B Testing Heavy)
description:
**Title:** CRO / Growth Specialist – Landing Pages + Paid Traffic (A/B Testing Heavy)



We are a fast-growing psychotherapy group practice looking for a highly data-driven CRO / Growth Specialist to build and optimize high-converting landing pages for Google Ads.



This is NOT a traditional design role. We are looking for someone obsessed with experimentation, A/B testing, and measurable performance.



**What You’ll Do:**



* Build and optimize 8–10 diagnosis-specific landing pages (e.g., anxiety, depression, PTSD)

* Create dedicated, distraction-free landing pages for paid traffic (no navigation, conversion-focused)

* Ensure tight message match between Google Ads ? landing pages

* Run frequent, structured A/B tests (headlines, CTAs, layouts, offers)

* Continuously iterate based on performance data



**Tracking & Analytics (Core Requirement):**

You must have hands-on experience with:



* Google Analytics (GA4) — tracking conversion events and analyzing performance

* Google Ads — conversion tracking, CPA, and campaign alignment

* An A/B testing platform such as VWO, Convert, or Zoho PageSense

* Behavior analytics tools such as Hotjar (heatmaps, session recordings)



You should be comfortable setting up and validating tracking across tools (not just using them).



**A/B Testing & Experimentation (Critical):**



* Strong track record of running continuous A/B tests (not one-off changes)

* Ability to form clear hypotheses and prioritize tests based on impact

* Experience maintaining an experimentation system (test backlog, logs, or dashboards)

* Focus on statistically meaningful results, not opinions



**Nice to Have:**



* Experience directly managing or optimizing Google Ads campaigns

* Experience with WordPress, Webflow, or similar platforms

* Experience in healthcare or service-based businesses



**How We’ll Work:**



* Start with 1–2 landing pages as a pilot

* Validate tracking + run rapid A/B tests

* Scale to additional pages based on performance



**To Apply, Please Include:**



1. Examples of landing pages you’ve built for paid traffic

2. Specific results (conversion rate improvements, CPA reductions, etc.)

3. Details of your tracking setup (how you used GA4, Ads, and testing tools)

4. A detailed example of an A/B testing program you’ve run (number of tests, tools, and outcomes)



**Note:** Applications without clear metrics, tracking experience, and experimentation examples will not be considered.

title: Asset Recovery Specialist – Sales Development Representative (Remote)
description:
The Opportunity

The position plays a critical role in managing and converting inbound and outbound lead flow into qualified opportunities. You’ll work closely with internal tea
mbers and directly engage with prospects, ensuring consistent communication, compliance, and pipeline progression. This is an execution-focused role where daily activity, organization, and attention to detail directly impact revenue outcomes.



Key Responsibilities

- Manage and maintain lead data through CRM (Excess Elite), ensuring records are accurate, organized, and up to date

- Conduct manual SMS outreach in compliance with U.S. regulations, following approved scripts and communication guidelines

- Perform high-volume outbound calling (50–100 calls per day), documenting outcomes in real time

- Respond to inbound messages, qualify prospects, and identify high-intent opportunities

- Track all interactions, notes, and follow-ups clearly within the system for full pipeline visibility

- Support pipeline management by consistently nurturing leads through follow-up sequences

- Assist with workflow optimization, process documentation, and maintaining SOP adherence



Compensation:

Competitive monthly compensation based on experience and role scope.



Monthly compensation ranges from ?64,000 – ?84,000, depending on experience and role scope. Final compensation is aligned with the candidate’s experience level.



Required Skills:

Core Technical Skills Required

- Experience with CRM management and pipeline tracking (Excess Elite preferred)

- Strong data entry and data management capabilities with high accuracy

- Experience handling outbound calls and SMS-based outreach workflows

- Ability to follow structured processes, scripts, and compliance guidelines

- Research and information gathering to support lead qualification



Professional Skills Required:

- Strong verbal communication skills with the ability to engage prospects professionally

- High attention to detail and organizational ability across multiple active leads



Candidate Fit:

- Reliable professionals who execute consistently and follow established processes

- Detail-oriented individuals comfortable managing multiple leads and conversations simultaneously

- Candidates who thrive in structured, metrics-driven environments with daily activity targets



Professional Readiness:

Candidates applying for this role should have a reliable home office setup, stable internet connection, and the ability to maintain consistent availability during the required working hours.



Successful candidates communicate proactively, meet deadlines, and take ownership of responsibilities while working remotely.



Application Process:

If you meet the requirements outlined above and are interested in this opportunity, please reply by uploading your resume and submitting a short 1-minute introduction video.



In your video briefly share:

 • Your professional background

 • The types of work you specialize in

 • Why this opportunity interests you



We will review applications and contact qualified candidates regarding next steps.

title: Bilingual Administrative Assistant (Mandarin)
description:
We're looking for a bilingual Admin Assistant who is fluent in English and  Mandarin to support a boutique law firm based in California, serving clients throughout the San Francisco Bay Area. The firm practices family law, employment law, and civil rights, and roughly half of its clients are Chinese-speaking. This role exists to make sure those clients are never left without clear, accurate communication at any point in their experience with the firm.



The split is approximately 30% live interpretation and translation, 70?ministrative support. You do not need a legal background. You do need to be sharp, dependable, and comfortable switching between languages in real client-facing situations.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Up to **14 days** of Paid Time Off annually (starting Day 1)

- Observance of **Holidays** per company guidelines

- **100% remote setup** so you can work wherever you’re most productive

- Direct involvement in meaningful legal matters that affect real people

- Small team environment where your work has immediate visibility and impact



## What You'll Work On



**Interpretation and Translation**



- Provide live interpretation between English and Mandarin during client calls, consultations, and case discussions

- Translate written documents,
s, and client-facing materials as needed

- Ensure accuracy and tone are preserved across both languages in sensitive legal contexts

- Serve as a communication bridge between the legal team and Chinese-speaking clients

- Step in for interpretation support on short notice when client needs arise



**Administrative Support**



- Handle data entry, document management, and file organization across firm systems

- Assist with basic bookkeeping tasks including expense tracking and invoice logging

- Draft, review, and respond to
s on behalf of the team as directed

- Support day-to-day operations across scheduling, client follow-ups, and internal coordination

- Maintain organized records with attention to detail and confidentiality



**Marketing Support (Nice to Have)**



- Assist with social media posting, content scheduling, or basic digital marketing tasks

- Help draft client-facing communications or update website copy when needed

- Support any outreach or visibility initiatives the firm pursues



## What You Bring



- Full professional fluency in English and Mandarin, written and spoken

- Mandarin fluency is strongly preferred

- Prior experience in an administrative, legal, or client-facing support role

- Comfort handling live interpretation in professional or high-stakes conversations

- Strong written communication skills in both English and Chinese

- Proficiency in standard productivity tools including
, spreadsheets, and document management platforms

- High attention to detail and a strong sense of confidentiality

- Ability to manage shifting priorities in a small, fast-moving team



## Nice to Have



- Background in legal, paralegal, or professional services environments

- Basic bookkeeping or accounting experience

- Experience with any legal practice management software

- Social media or digital marketing skills



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes)** introducing yourself in both English and Cantonese or Mandarin, and briefly describing a situation where you had to communicate clearly across a language barrier in a professional setting



**Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.**



If you are fluent in both worlds, can hold a room in two languages, and take pride in making every client feel understood, this role puts you at the center of work that genuinely matters.

title: Manager of Accounting
description:
Full-Time Employee (Not a Contractor Role)



Join our team as an Accounting Manager, where you’ll play a key role in leading the day-to-day operations of your team while supporting our clients with accuracy, professionalism, and care. This is a remote, full-time position based in the Philippines, with an initial focus on aligning with your manager's time zone.



About the Role



As a Accounting Manager, you’ll be responsible for ensuring the accuracy and timely completion of all accounting tasks owned by your team. You’ll also provide leadership, mentorship, and support to junior staff to help them reach their fullest potential.



Key Responsibilities



Supervisory Duties:



• Manage and mentor junior staff working on account reconciliation, payroll, accounts payable, accounts receivable, sales tax, and more

• Conduct performance evaluations and provide coaching

• Lead training efforts for new hires and ongoing staff development

• Foster a positive, professional, and collaborative team environment

Client & Team Management:



• Own timely and accurate completion of all tasks for assigned clients

• Coordinate internal work assignments and team priorities

• Manage projects and deadlines using our Project Management platform

• Hold the team accountable for quality and timeliness

• Oversee the preparation of financial statements and client reports

Technical & Process Support:



• Verify, allocate, post, and reconcile general ledger accounts

• Produce error-free accounting reports and analyze financial data

• Identify areas for process improvement and lead implementation

• Provide support for audits and tax matters

• Participate in setting standards and improving workflows

• Develop documentation and strengthen internal controls



What We’re Looking For

• Strong analytical skills and thorough knowledge of accounting principles

• Excellent organizational and leadership abilities

• Experience in managing accounting workflows and team supervision

• Ability to adapt, take initiative, and lead process improvements

• Familiarity with project management and accounting software tools

• Must have U.S. accounting experience



Work Schedule

This is a full-time, remote position for candidates based in the Philippines.



• Initial 90 days: Work hours must align with your manager’s time zone, which includes working some hours during the 10:00 PM – 6:00 AM night shift (Philippine time)

• Post-90 days: Based on performance, you’ll work with your director to set a schedule that includes a 4-hour overlap with your manager’s time zone



Compensation & Benefits

• Competitive salary, dependent on experience (DOE)

• Opportunities for internal promotions and career growth

• 15 days of paid time off (PTO) annually

• Paid Philippine holidays off

• Medical, dental, and vision insurance offered

Skills:

 management via Microsoft Outlook

• Work/Life Harmony – We are proud to offer flexible work schedules and a work from home opportunity.

• Global Team Experience – We work closely with our international tea
mbers who all share our same passion for serving our clients in bookkeeping, accounting, and tax services.

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
About Pirate Ventures: 



 At Pirate Ventures, we create and manage immersive hospitality and entertainment experiences that “Deliver the Unexpected.” From themed pop-up bars to unique venue activations, we’re driven by creativity, operational excellence, and community. We're looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized Virtual Executive Assistant to support our Culinary and Operations Directors and help streamline their day-to-day administrative operations. 



 Position Overview: 



 The Virtual Executive Assistant plays a central role in ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of executive-level workflows. This is a fully remote position that supports two senior leaders — the Culinary Director and the Operations Director — with scheduling, HR coordination, vendor communications, and operational tasks. The ideal candidate is proactive, tech-savvy, and thrives in a fast-paced environment. 



 Availability:  



Full-time (40 hours/week), aligned to Eastern Standard Time. 



Key Responsibilities: 



 HR & People Operations Support: 



Hiring & Applicant Tracking: Manage job postings across applicant tracking platforms, coordinate interviews, and support hiring managers with scheduling. 



Background Check Coordination: Manage the background check process for new hires, ensuring timely completion and documentation. 



Employee Verification & Documentation: Respond to employment verification requests and other HR-related information inquiries. 



Benefits Administration: Validate and upload 401(k) contribution files; assist with benefits-related data entry and reporting. 



Payroll Support: Input wage garnishment deductions into the payroll system with accuracy and confidentiality. 



System Access Management: Maintain user access for internal systems and tools related to HR, payroll, and business operations. 



 



 Business Administration & Operational Support: 



 Mailbox Management: Monitor the virtual mailbox daily; flag items for scanning, shredding, or physical pickup as needed 



Calendar & Meeting Coordination: Manage company-wide calendars and coordinate recurring and ad hoc meetings across departments. 



Licensing & Compliance: Oversee business license and ABCA licensing processes; maintain a calendar of deadlines and ensure timely renewals and submissions. 



Parking & Transit Administration: Look up and pay company-related parking tickets; manage transportation stipends and reimbursements. 



Supplies & Vendor Orders: Coordinate print and office supply orders and liaise with vendors to fulfill company needs. 



Gifting Coordination: Source, package, and send gifts for tea
mbers, clients, and special occasions. 



Document & Data Management: Draft and format internal documents, maintain organized digital filing systems, and support ongoing process improvement. 



Qualifications: 



 Proven experience in office or administrative management (virtual/remote strongly preferred) 



Strong proficiency in cloud-based tools (e.g., Google Workspace, Slack, Zoom, Asana, payroll/HRIS systems) 



Excellent written and verbal communication skills 



Highly organized with strong attention to detail and follow-through 



Ability to handle confidential information with discretion 



Prior experience in hospitality, HR, or operations is a plus 



Compensation: 



 Commensurate with experience. This is a full-time, remote position (40 hours/week) with working hours on Eastern Standard Time. 



To Apply: 



 Submit your resume and a short 1–2-minute video introducing yourself and sharing why you’re excited to join the Pirate Ventures team. We’re not looking for a polished production—just a chance to get to know you beyond the page. Please send your materials to

title: Client Success Representative (Sales Support) Swing Supplies | Dallas, TX | Remote | Full-Time
description:
About Swing Supplies

Swing Supplies is a fast-growing custom golf merchandise company based in Dallas, TX. We design and deliver premium custom headcovers, towels, and branded gear for golf tournaments, charity events, school programs, and corporate outings across the US. We're in our systemization year, building the team and processes that will carry us into 2027 and beyond.



About the Role

We're looking for a Client Success Representative who is warm, sharp, and genuinely loves people. You'll be the first point of contact for inbound leads - responding quickly, building relationships, and guiding clients from first inquiry all the way to a closed order.

This role works closely with our Sales Manager and Operations team. If you're someone who communicates naturally, follows up without being pushed, and takes pride in making clients feel genuinely taken care of, this is for you.



What You'll Be Doing



Responding to inbound leads via
, CRM, and messaging platforms

Sending quotes, following up consistently, and nurturing relationships at every stage

Qualifying leads based on order quantity and event fit

Drafting personalized client messages that feel warm and human — not scripted

Coordinating with operations to keep clients updated on their order status

Updating and maintaining the CRM (HoneyBook) and lead tracker accurately every day

Supporting the Sales Manager on pricing conversations, proposals, and special requests

Representing the Swing Supplies brand with care and professionalism in every interaction





What We're Looking For



Strong written and verbal English communication — you write like a real person, not a template

Able to build trust quickly and maintain long-term relationships, not just close one-off transactions

Detail-oriented with client requests, designs, quantities, and deadlines

Comfortable managing multiple conversations simultaneously without dropping the ball

Responsive and reliable - you have a natural sense of urgency

Self-sufficient and proactive - you move conversations forward without constant direction

Able to handle objections around pricing, minimums, and timelines with confidence and composure

Warm and professional - you keep communication human even when things get busy

Coachable and open to feedback while staying consistent in quality

Thinks in terms of long-term client relationships, not just transactions

1–3 years of experience in sales support, customer service, or client-facing roles preferred





Bonus Points



Familiar with HoneyBook, invoicing tools, or quoting platforms

Background in events, tournaments, school programs, or branded merchandise

Experience in golf, sports, or custom products industry





What You Get



Remote, flexible work setup

Direct mentorship from a hands-on Sales Manager

A tight-knit, collaborative team that genuinely invests in your growth

Front-row seat to a growing company — real opportunity to grow with us into 2027





How to Apply

Please fill out our application form here: 

The form includes a short video introduction.  We want to hear your voice, see your personality, and get a feel for how you communicate. Don't overthink it,  just be yourself!

title: Outbound Appointment Setter (Paid Training + Result Bonuses)

eting for our sales team.

eting

eting)

title: Content Creation & Copywriter
description:

This role is ideal for a strong writer who understands the U.S. market, can create compelling copy across platforms, and can pair writing with effective visual content in real estate industry.

, X 
), and
 marketing.

- Design visual content using Canva: posters, flyers, carousels, and social media templates.

Application Requirement (Important)

 copy).

Compensation & Benefits

- Full-time remote role aligned with US PST hours (10:00 AM – 6:00 PM).

- Growth opportunities in content strategy, branding, and real estate marketing.

title: Amazon Account Manager
description:
Amazon Account Manager (Seller Central Operations – Senior Level)

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Working Hours: Full-time, aligned with Eastern Time (US)



About Lemon Adds

Lemon Adds is a performance-driven eCommerce marketing agency built to scale brands profitably — no fluff, no guesswork.

We work with fast-growing DTC and Amazon brands across multiple industries, managing everything from paid media to retention, influencer marketing, and marketplace growth.

Our focus is simple: execution, accountability, and results.



About the Role

We’re looking for a highly capable Amazon operator who lives inside Seller Central.

This is not a junior role and not a passive support position. You will be hands-on managing the operational side of Amazon accounts, ensuring everything runs smoothly, efficiently, and at a high level.

You will be working closely and reporting directly to the Head of Amazon, supporting execution across multiple brands and contributing to overall account performance and growth.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Manage and operate Seller Central accounts across multiple brands

Handle listing creation, optimization, and updates (titles, bullets, backend, variations)

Monitor and maintain account health metrics and resolve compliance issues

Troubleshoot listing suppressions, stranded inventory, and account-related problems

Coordinate product launches and listing rollouts

Work closely with PPC, creative, and strategy teams to execute campaigns

Conduct keyword research and listing optimization using tools like Helium 10

Oversee inventory tracking, stock levels, and replenishment alerts

Identify and flag potential operational risks before they impact performance

Ensure accuracy and consistency across listings, storefronts, and backend data



Must-Have Requirements

3+ years of hands-on experience with Amazon Seller Central

Strong experience managing account health (policy compliance, performance metrics, issue resolution)

Proven experience with inventory management (stock monitoring, forecasting support, avoiding stockouts/overstock)

Experience working with international Amazon marketplaces (e.g., US, CA, MX, EU, etc.)

Deep familiarity with tools like Helium 10 (or equivalent)

Strong understanding of Amazon listing structure, SEO, and backend systems

Experience troubleshooting common Amazon issues (suppressed listings, flat files, variations, etc.)

High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple accounts simultaneously

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Ability to work full-time in Eastern Time (US) — non-negotiable



Nice to Have

Spanish proficiency

Experience working with agencies or managing multiple brands

Familiarity with Amazon Vendor Central

Basic understanding of PPC (to collaborate effectively with the media buying team)



Who You Are

Execution-driven — you get things done fast and correctly

Organized and process-oriented

Comfortable working in fast-paced, performance-focused environments

Proactive — you spot issues before they become problems

Team player who can collaborate across departments without hand-holding



Important

This role requires full alignment with Eastern Time (US) working hours.

Applicants who cannot meet this requirement will not be considered.

title: Video Editor - Fitness and Anime YouTube Channel
description:
About the channel



Gokuflex is one of the longest-running fitness channels on YouTube. The brand blends Dragon Ball Z mythology with real-world training, identity transformation, and fatherhood. We have been doing this for over 11 years and our audience is here to become the best version of themselves.

We are not looking for a basic editor. We need someone who trains, knows anime inside and out, and is obsessed with making videos that stop the scroll.



What you will be editing



YouTube long-form videos including vlogs, training content, transformations, and motivation

YouTube Shorts and Instagram Reels

Client transformation spotlights and social proof content

Motivational Saiyan Dad identity content



Hard requirements - non-negotiable



Deep Dragon Ball Z knowledge. You must know the arcs, characters, power levels, and lore. Not optional.

Broad anime knowledge including One Piece, Naruto, Jujutsu Kaisen and beyond.

Real fitness understanding. You need to know training, body transformation, nutrition, and gym culture. If you have never been in that world, this role is not for you.

Professional-level skill in Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

Expert at pacing, jump cuts, music sync, and keeping viewers locked in from hook to CTA.

Able to meet deadlines and communicate clearly in English.

Fast, reliable internet and a computer that can handle 4K footage.



Skills that will make you stand out



Motion graphics, anime-style transitions, After Effects or CapCut, color grading, sound design and SFX, DBZ power-up effects, thumbnail creation, YouTube SEO awareness, short-form viral instincts.

Bonus: If you personally train or have your own transformation story, include it. We value people who live the brand.



What makes the best Gokuflex editor



You know the first 3 seconds either win or lose the viewer and you edit accordingly.

You can use DBZ power-up 
nts, transformation sequences, and iconic music as storytelling tools, not just cool effects.

You can take a raw training vlog and turn it into a cinematic Saiyan origin story.

You study what is going viral on YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikTok every single week.

You obsess over retention and understand the difference between a video that gets clicked and one that gets finished.

You bring ideas, not just execution.



Work structure



100% remote, work from home

Full-time preferred, part-time considered based on experience and output

Consistent weekly video schedule with real deadlines

Direct collaboration with the channel owner via WhatsApp and Google Drive

Paid in USD via Wise or similar. Starting at $800/month scaling to $1,200 based on experience and performance.



How to apply



Send your application with the subject line: SAIYAN EDITOR - [Your Name]

Applications without this subject line will not be reviewed.

title: Lead Generation and Lead Nurture (via Social Media)
description:
This is a long-term, full-time position for the right person (you will have job security).



If you are looking for a gig or part-time work, this will not be a fit. I’m looking for someone to work with for years, not weeks.



The hours for this position are currently, Monday to Friday, from 8am to 5pm PST (California time).



Below are the requirements as well as how to apply.  To be considered, please follow the instructions exactly.



POSITION & JOB DUTIES



Your daily tasks will include:



1) Creating and editing PDFs (i.e guides, checklists, etc. to be used for lead generation)

2) Video editing (i.e. b-roll, subtitles, etc.)

3) Image creation and editing (i.e. Canva, etc.)

4) Posting on social media

5) Responding to people who comment, react and/or DM

6) Adding people as friends/contacts on FB, LI, etc.

7) Research hot prospects and engage in conversation (online)

8) Call warm prospects on phone (no cold calling)

9) Onboard new clients

10) Organize leads, prospects, clients so we can easily track them



The following are not required but a plus if you know them (please let me know if you do) . . .



-How to use a Mac (we don’t use PCs)

-Knowledge/Expertise in GHL (Go High Level)

-Experience in information marketing and/or working for a business/marketing coach.

-Experience working with lawyers



HOW TO APPLY (please follow exact instructions)



Respond here, on the onlinejobs.ph site, do not send me an
, and send me links to the following:



1) Graphics you have created for social media

2) Videos you have edited

3) A 30-60 second audio that starts with the words, “Good Morning Mr. Kumar” and tells me a bit about you (don’t read a script, just talk to me as if we’re friends and talk to me about whatever you want)

4) Your OnlineJobs.PH profile

5) Your resume



Also let me know . . . 



1) What hourly rate, in USD, you are looking for

2) What you are looking for in a job and in a boss

3) A bit about you personally. No business here. What do you enjoy? Where do you life? Do you have a family? What are your hobbies, etc.? This is where I get to know a bit about you before we speak.



AFTER YOU APPLY



Assuming you followed the instructions above, I will acknowledge your application and let you know if you have made it to the next stage. I may also ask you some questions if I need clarification on anything and/or request to schedule a preliminary zoom interview.



Thank you for taking the time to read through this and good luck :)

title: Digital Layout Designer (Like Figma)
description:
You MUST DO ALL THE FOLLOWING to be considered for the job:



1)
 [INSERT
] with the title "I WANT TO BE YOUR LAYOUT DESIGNER".



2) Your resume should be linked within the
 with relevant experience. LinkedIn too if you have.



3) You'll polish digital replicas of real hardware instruments (synthesizers and DJ controllers) using our browser-based editor. Controls are already placed for you. Your job is to make them look right: aligned, evenly spaced, correctly labeled, matching the visual rhythm of the actual hardware. Layout QA + polish - the rough draft is in the editor, you bring it to production quality. Knowing Figma is a plus!



No instructions from us. All we want you to do is be accurate, precise, patient, communicative, and creative. This is the most important aspect of the interview. Make a GREAT first design using our editor!



What you'll do:

- Open a panel in our editor (controls pre-placed)

- Align controls into rows/columns/groups, distribute spacing evenly

- Adjust label text, position, visibility

- Fix visual drift, overlap, misalignment

- Submit for review when production-ready



Tools: Align (6-way), Distribute, Group, Label properties, snap grid, shortcuts, undo/redo. If you know Figma, productive in 15 min.



Who you are: Visual eye for 2px drift, patient polish work across 50-100 controls, Figma-proficient (editor is similar but not exactly like Figma), no technical background needed.



4) Also create a 1 minute long loom video (NO LONGER than 1 minute) and introduce yourself.



5) Fluent English needed



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: LinkedIn Growth Manager
description:
About Hello Jade Marketing



Hello Jade Marketing is a results-driven social media agency based in the United States. We manage social media strategy, content creation, and growth for business owners across industries including medspas, law firms, real estate, coaching, construction, and nonprofits.



We are a lean, systems-driven team. We take our work seriously, communicate clearly, and take full ownership of our roles. We are looking for someone who operates the same way.



The Opportunity



We are building our LinkedIn presence from the ground up with one clear goal: attract and connect with business owners in the United States who need social media management services.



This is not a post-and-schedule role. We are looking for someone who can think strategically, write with confidence, repurpose existing content intelligently, and engage in a way that builds real relationships and generates qualified leads.



You will have access to our existing content library in Rella (our scheduling platform), which includes Instagram content, client results, and educational posts. You will pull what is relevant, adapt it for LinkedIn, and create original content when needed. You will own this channel and be accountable for its growth.



What You Will Own



Content Strategy and Publishing (3 posts per week)

 • Review existing content in Rella and identify what can be repurposed for LinkedIn

 • Adapt Instagram content for LinkedIn format: professional tone, text-first, line-broken for readability

 • Write original LinkedIn posts when existing content does not fit, including authority posts, pain point posts, and industry commentary

 • Create simple Canva graphics for client result posts when needed

 • Schedule all content in Rella and ensure posts go live consistently

 • Test different post formats and note what drives the most engagement



Lead Generation and Engagement (30 minutes per day)



 • Proactively connect with and engage with ideal clients: medspa owners, lawyers, real estate agents, coaches, fitness studio owners, and other business owners in the United States

 • Leave thoughtful, specific comments on posts from ideal clients and referral partners (never generic, never copy-paste)

 • Build genuine relationships with potential leads through consistent and strategic interaction

 • Identify warm connections who may be ready for a conversation and flag them to the team

 • Respond to all comments on our posts within 24 hours

 • Monitor DMs and flag any inbound leads or inquiries immediately



Profile and Presence Management



 • Keep the LinkedIn profile optimized and up to date

 • Monitor performance of posts and adjust content approach based on what is working

 • Stay current on LinkedIn best practices and bring ideas to the table



Weekly Reporting



 • Submit a weekly report every Friday covering: posts published, engagement activity, follower growth, leads flagged, and any notable interactions





Who We Are Looking For



 • You have hands-on experience growing a LinkedIn presence for a business or personal brand

 • You can write in a confident, professional, and engaging voice in English

 • You understand LinkedIn is a text-first, relationship-driven platform and know how to use it differently than Instagram

 • You are a self-starter who does not need content handed to you every week

 • You take initiative, think ahead, and communicate proactively

 • You are highly consistent, this role requires showing up every single weekday with focus and intention

 • You understand B2B lead generation and can identify who the right people to engage with are

 • You take pride in the quality of your work and do not cut corners



Bonus Structure



We believe in rewarding results, not just activity. If a lead you generate on LinkedIn books a discovery call and signs on as a Hello Jade Marketing client, you will receive a performance bonus. Bonus details will be discussed and agreed upon before your start date.



This means the better you perform, the more you earn. There is no cap on bonuses.



Tools You Will Use

 • Rella (content scheduling and existing content library)

 • Canva (for simple graphics, templates will be provided)

 • LinkedIn (profile and page management)

 • Google Sheets (weekly reporting)

 • Slack or
 for team communication

title: Content & Partnerships Growth Assistant
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a proactive, sharp-minded Content & Partnerships Growth Assistant to act as a right-hand to the founder. This is not a "task-only" role; we need a creative thinker who can provide an external point of view, challenge ideas, and take full ownership of two critical growth pillars: Strategic Partnerships and Content Management.



The ideal candidate understands that in 2026, authenticity beats high-production polish. You will be responsible for building human-to-human connections with partners and ensuring a consistent stream of "unfiltered" content reaches our audience.



Key Responsibilities

1. Partnership Development (Head of Partnerships)



Active Outreach: Identify and message potential partnership contacts daily.

Relationship Building: Focus on high-quality, conversational outreach rather than "cold spam" to build long-term rapport.

Scheduling: Manage the founder’s calendar by booking calls with potential new partners.

Strategy: Assist in identifying the "right" people to target based on business goals.



2. Content Strategy & Management



Idea Generation: Collaborate with the founder to brainstorm and sort through topics for new video content.

Simple Video Editing: Perform "low-fi" editing—putting together cuts, adding titles/captions, and ensuring a natural, unfiltered look. (High technical complexity is not required; speed and consistency are).

Content Distribution: Manage the workflow of getting content out across platforms, ensuring the founder’s brand stays top-of-mind.

Performance Tracking: Offer feedback on what content is performing well and suggest pivots in strategy.



3. Strategic Support (Executive Initiative)



Critical Thinking: Act as a sounding board for the founder. Don't just execute—evaluate.

Process Automation: Help streamline the partnership and content workflows so they run like a "machine."

Future Growth: Eventually assist with customer inquiries, technical support, and onboarding as you become familiar with the business operations.





Requirements & Qualifications

• Mindset: You are a "self-starter" who shows initiative. You don’t wait for a checklist; you see a gap and fill it.

• Communication: Exceptional written communication skills with the ability to sound human, not robotic, in DMs and
s.

• Content Savvy: A strong understanding of current 2026 social media trends (the shift toward natural, raw, and authentic content).

• Technical Skills: * Basic video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or mobile editing tools).

Familiarity with social media platforms and scheduling tools.

• Reliability: You are highly consistent and show up every day. You value "speed to market" over perfection.



Work Style & Environment



Direct Access: You will work closely with the founder, primarily communicating via WhatsApp for quick updates.

Growth Potential: As the business "blows up," this role has the potential to expand into a management position involving team scaling and operations.

Time Commitment: Initially estimated at a few hours per day (roughly 1 hour for partnerships and 1–2 hours for content management).



How to Apply:

To be considered, please send the following 



Updated CV/Resume

Short video introduction (introduce yourself, your relevant experience, and why you’re the right fit for this role)

Portfolio or examples of past work (if applicable)

Note: Applications without these three items will not be reviewed.

title: Nurture Leads / Start Conversations
description:
Your role will focus on nurturing leads from our coaching business for lawyers. 



We post on social media about common challenges lawyers face. Assume we receive responses like these. 



For each, explain how you'd engage the commenter, focusing on building a conversation without pitching our services. Be creative, and feel free to explore different approaches (please feel free to be creative and think outside the box).



At the end of your response, please include a brief explanation of how you developed each engagement approach. Outline what factors you considered, how you d
 on the tone, and why you chose that particular way to foster trust. This will help me understand your thought process and whether it’s primarily your own or supported by external tools.



Post 1: “I’ve had so many calls where people want free advice and never hire. Anyone else? How do you handle it?” 

Comment 1: “I get these calls weekly, give advice, and they vanish. It’s draining.”



Post 2: “I’ve had consultations where everything felt right, but no one signed. Anyone else feel stuck converting clients?”

Comment 2: “I had three consults, all seemed interested, but none signed. I’m missing something, and it’s frustrating.”



Post 3: “Difficult clients draining your energy? You’re not alone.” 

Comment 3: “One client calls daily, adds demands, complains about fees. I’m exhausted.”



Post 4: “Ever get an unfair one-star review? It’s tough.” 

Comment 4: “I got a one-star review from someone I never worked with. I’m furious and don’t know how to respond.”



Please share how you would engage each commenter to foster a genuine conversation. No selling. Show how you nurture trust.

title: Amazon Specialist (Full EU Setup & Growth) – Experienced Only
description:
Amazon Specialist (Full EU Setup & Growth) – Experienced Only



We are looking for an experienced Amazon Specialist to take full ownership of our Amazon operations across Europe.



About Us



We are a growing e-commerce company with:



Our own private label products

Distribution rights for a brand within the Benelux (which we are also allowed to sell on Amazon)



Currently, we generate strong sales through marketplaces such as 
 (Netherlands & Belgium), Decathlon, MediaMarkt, and others. However, Amazon has never been a primary focus for us — and that’s exactly where you come in.



Current Situation

- Most listings are already created (but not fully optimized)

- Some products already have reviews

- Inventory is available at Amazon FBA

- We have a German VAT number (FBA orders are shipped from Germany)

- We also operate our own fulfillment center in the Netherlands (capable of shipping across Europe)

- However, much of the Amazon setup is not fully optimized or structured yet



Your Role

- You will take full responsibility for setting up, optimizing, and scaling our Amazon presence across Europe.



Responsibilities

- Optimize and manage product listings (titles, keywords, SEO)

- Create and improve A+ Content and Brand Store

- Manage and scale PPC campaigns (focus on profitability)

- Ensure account health and compliance

- Monitor listings to keep them active and performing

- Set up and optimize FBA + FBM logistics across Europe

- Provide clear daily or weekly performance reports

- Communicate proactively about issues and opportunities



Design & Content

- Create high-converting Amazon infographic images (we use Canva)

- Improve visual presentation to increase conversion rates



Requirements

- Proven experience managing Amazon accounts (EU experience is a big plus)

- Strong understanding of Amazon SEO, PPC, and conversion optimization

- Experience with A+ Content, Brand Stores, and listing optimization

- Ability to analyze performance and focus on profitability

- Good communication and reporting skills

- Reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented



Nice to Have

- Experience with multi-country Amazon setups (Pan-EU, VAT, logistics)

- Experience working with both FBA and FBM



- Goal



Your mission is to turn Amazon into a major revenue channel for our business — in a structured, scalable, and profitable way.



If you have proven Amazon experience and can take full ownership from A to Z, we would love to work with you.



Please include examples of Amazon accounts or listings you have worked on.
